**Update: `src/main/java/com/jmix/executor/impl/ModuleConstraintExecutorImpl.java`**

```diff
@@
     private List<String> validateModuleInst(Module module, ModuleInst moduleInst) {
         Set<String> selectedCodes = selectedPartCodes(moduleInst);
         List<String> violatedRuleCodes = new ArrayList<>();
         for (Rule rule : module.getAllRules()) {
@@
             if (!validateStructRule(module, rule, selectedCodes)) {
                 violatedRuleCodes.add(rule.getCode());
             }
         }
         return violatedRuleCodes;
     }
+
+    private List<String> resolveStructExprCodes(Module module, StructExprSchema expr) {
+        validateStructExpr(module, expr);
+        List<Part> candidates = module.getAllAtomicParts(expr.getObjectCode());
+        if (candidates == null || candidates.isEmpty()) {
+            return new ArrayList<>();
+        }
+        List<Part> filtered = filterStructParts(candidates, expr);
+        return filtered.stream().map(Part::getCode).distinct().toList();
+    }
+
+    private List<Part> filterStructParts(List<Part> candidates, StructExprSchema expr) {
+        List<String> values = expr.getValues() == null ? List.of() : expr.getValues();
+        if (values.isEmpty()) {
+            throw new AlgLoaderException("Structured expression values cannot be empty: " + expr.getObjectCode());
+        }
+        if (expr.getOperator() == StructCompareOperator.IN) {
+            Map<String, Part> result = new LinkedHashMap<>();
+            for (String value : values) {
+                for (Part part : filterStructPartsBySingleValue(candidates, expr, value)) {
+                    result.put(part.getCode(), part);
+                }
+            }
+            return new ArrayList<>(result.values());
+        }
+        if (expr.getOperator() == StructCompareOperator.NOT_IN) {
+            List<Part> result = new ArrayList<>(candidates);
+            for (String value : values) {
+                result = filterStructPartsBySingleValue(result, expr, value);
+            }
+            return result;
+        }
+        return filterStructPartsBySingleValue(candidates, expr, values.get(0));
+    }
+
+    private List<Part> filterStructPartsBySingleValue(List<Part> candidates, StructExprSchema expr, String value) {
+        return FilterExpressionExecutor.doSelect(candidates, toFilterExpr(expr, value));
+    }
+
+    private String toFilterExpr(StructExprSchema expr, String value) {
+        return switch (expr.getOperator()) {
+            case EQ, IN -> expr.getAttrCode() + "=" + value;
+            case NE, NOT_IN -> expr.getAttrCode() + "!=" + value;
+            case GT -> expr.getAttrCode() + ">" + value;
+            case GE -> expr.getAttrCode() + ">=" + value;
+            case LT -> expr.getAttrCode() + "<" + value;
+            case LE -> expr.getAttrCode() + "<=" + value;
+            case LIKE -> expr.getAttrCode() + " like \"" + value + "\"";
+            case NOT_LIKE -> expr.getAttrCode() + " not like \"" + value + "\"";
+        };
+    }
+
+    private void validateStructExpr(Module module, StructExprSchema expr) {
+        if (expr == null) {
+            throw new AlgLoaderException("Structured expression cannot be null");
+        }
+        if (Strings.isNullOrEmpty(expr.getObjectCode())) {
+            throw new AlgLoaderException("Structured expression objectCode cannot be empty");
+        }
+        if (module.getPartCategory(expr.getObjectCode()) == null) {
+            throw new AlgLoaderException("PartCategory not found for structured expression: "
+                    + expr.getObjectCode());
+        }
+        if (Strings.isNullOrEmpty(expr.getAttrCode())) {
+            throw new AlgLoaderException("Structured expression attrCode cannot be empty");
+        }
+        if (expr.getOperator() == null) {
+            throw new AlgLoaderException("Structured expression operator cannot be null");
+        }
+    }
+
+    private List<PartCombination> expandStructExprs(Module module, List<StructExprSchema> exprs,
+            String sourceRuleCode) {
+        List<List<String>> partCodeSets = new ArrayList<>();
+        for (StructExprSchema expr : exprs) {
+            partCodeSets.add(resolveStructExprCodes(module, expr));
+        }
+        List<PartCombination> result = new ArrayList<>();
+        expandStructCartesian(partCodeSets, 0, new ArrayList<>(), sourceRuleCode, result);
+        return result;
+    }
+
+    private void expandStructCartesian(List<List<String>> partCodeSets, int index, List<String> tuple,
+            String sourceRuleCode, List<PartCombination> result) {
+        if (index == partCodeSets.size()) {
+            result.add(toPartCombination(tuple, sourceRuleCode));
+            return;
+        }
+        for (String partCode : partCodeSets.get(index)) {
+            tuple.add(partCode);
+            expandStructCartesian(partCodeSets, index + 1, tuple, sourceRuleCode, result);
+            tuple.remove(tuple.size() - 1);
+        }
+    }
+
+    private PartCombination toPartCombination(List<String> tuple, String sourceRuleCode) {
+        if (tuple.size() == 2) {
+            return new PartCombination(tuple.get(0), tuple.get(1), sourceRuleCode);
+        }
+        if (tuple.size() == 3) {
+            return new PartCombination(tuple.get(0), tuple.get(1), tuple.get(2), sourceRuleCode);
+        }
+        throw new AlgLoaderException("Unsupported structured rule arity: " + tuple.size());
+    }
 
     private boolean validateStructRule(Module module, Rule rule, Set<String> selectedCodes) {
```

public class StructCombinationRuleTest extends ModuleScenarioTestBase {

    private final List<Rule> installedRules = new ArrayList<>();

    public StructCombinationRuleTest() {
        super(StructCombinationConstraint.class);
    }

    @Override
    protected void beforeInitConfig(ConstraintConfig cfg) {
        cfg.setLoadType(ConstraintConfig.LOAD_TYPE_FULL);
    }

    @Override
    protected Module buildModule(Class<?> moduleAlgClazz) {
        Module module = super.buildModule(moduleAlgClazz);
        for (Rule rule : installedRules) {

        }
        module.init();
        return module;
    }

    @AlgorithmApiVersion(southApiVersion = "1.0", algorithmVersion = "rfc-0007-test")

+        }
+
+        @TripleStructRuleAnno(
+                code = "cpu_drive_monitor_white_001",
+                parentRuleCode = "cpu_drive_monitor_white",
+                expr1ObjectCode = "cpu",
+                expr1AttrCode = "CoreNum",
+                expr1Values = {"8"},
+                relationType = BusinessRelationType.CO_DEPENDENT,
+                expr2ObjectCode = "drive",
+                expr2AttrCode = "Speed",
+                expr2Values = {"7200"},
+                expr3ObjectCode = "monitor",
+                expr3AttrCode = "Resolution",
+                expr3Values = {"4K"})
+        public void cpuDriveMonitorWhite001() {
+        }
+    }
+
+    @Test
+    public void testAnnotationGeneratedStructRules() {
+        Rule parent = getModule().getRule("cpu_drive_white").orElseThrow();
+        assertNotNull(parent.getExeSchema());
+        CodependantRuleSchema schema = (CodependantRuleSchema) parent.getExeSchema();
+        assertEquals(2, schema.getArity());
+        assertEquals(4, schema.getCombinations().size());
+    }
+
+    @Test
+    public void testPairStructRule_Incompatible() {
+        assertNoSolution("cpu4", "drive7000");
+        assertNoSolution("cpu4", "drive5400");
+        assertPass("cpu4", "drive7200");
+    }
+
+    @Test
+    public void testCombinationWhiteList_Pair_Generation() {
+        assertPass("cpu4", "drive5400");
+        assertNoSolution("cpu4", "drive7200");
+        assertPass("cpu8", "drive5400");
+        assertPass("cpu8", "drive7200");
+        assertNoSolution("cpu12", "drive5400");
+        assertPass("cpu12", "drive7200");
+    }
+
+    @Test
+    public void testCombinationWhiteList_Triple_Generation() {
+        assertPass("cpu8", "drive7200", "monitor4k");
+        assertNoSolution("cpu8", "drive5400", "monitor4k");
+    }
+
+    @Test
+    public void testValidateCombinationWhiteList_Pair() {
+        Result<ModuleValidateResp> valid = validate(moduleInst("cpu4", "drive5400"));
+        assertEquals(Result.SUCCESS, valid.getCode());
+        assertTrue(valid.getData().isValid());
+
+        Result<ModuleValidateResp> invalid = validate(moduleInst("cpu4", "drive7200"));
+        assertEquals(Result.SUCCESS, invalid.getCode());
+        assertFalse(invalid.getData().isValid());
+        assertTrue(invalid.getData().getViolatedRuleCodes().contains("cpu_drive_white"));
+    }
+
+    @Test
+    public void testValidateCombination_WithQuantityInput() {
+        Result<ModuleValidateResp> result = validate(moduleInst(partInst("cpu4", 1), partInst("drive5400", 2)));
+        assertEquals(Result.SUCCESS, result.getCode());
+        assertTrue(result.getData().isValid());
+    }
+
+    @Test
+    public void testCombinationRule_IntersectWithRuntimeFilter() {
+        InferParasReq req = new InferParasReq();
+        req.setModuleId(getModule().getId());
+        req.setEnumerateAllSolution(false);
+        req.setPrePartInsts(toPrePartInsts("cpu4"));
+
+        PartConstraintReq driveReq = new PartConstraintReq();
+        driveReq.setPartCategoryCode("drive");
+        driveReq.setAttrType(AttrParaType.Sum);
+        driveReq.setAttrCode("Quantity");
+        driveReq.setAttrComparator("==");
+        driveReq.setAttrValue("1");
+        driveReq.setAttrWhereCondition("Speed=7200");
+        req.setPartConstraintReqs(List.of(driveReq));
+
+        Result<List<ModuleInst>> result = ModuleConstraintExecutor.INST.inferParas(req);
+        setResult(result);
+        setSolutions(result.getData());
+        assertTrue(result.getCode() == Result.NO_SOLUTION
+                || (result.getCode() == Result.SUCCESS && (result.getData() == null || result.getData().isEmpty())));
+    }
+
+    @Test
+    public void testChildRule_NotExecutedIndependently() {
+        assertPass("cpu4", "drive5400");
+        assertNoSolution("cpu4", "drive7200");
+    }
+
+    private Result<ModuleValidateResp> validate(ModuleInst moduleInst) {
+        ModuleValidateReq req = new ModuleValidateReq();
+        req.setModuleId(getModule().getId());
+        req.setModuleInst(moduleInst);
+        return ModuleConstraintExecutor.INST.validate(req);
+    }
+
+    private ModuleInst moduleInst(String... selectedPartCodes) {
+        return moduleInst(toPrePartInsts(selectedPartCodes).toArray(PartInst[]::new));
+    }
+
+    private ModuleInst moduleInst(PartInst... partInsts) {
+        ModuleInst inst = new ModuleInst();
+        inst.setId(getModule().getId());
+        for (PartInst partInst : partInsts) {
+            inst.addPartInst(partInst);
+        }
+        return inst;
+    }
+
+    private PartInst partInst(String code, int quantity) {
+        PartInst partInst = new PartInst(code, quantity);
+        partInst.setSelected(quantity > 0);
+        return partInst;
+    }
+
+    private void assertPass(String... selectedPartCodes) {
+        runWithSelectedParts(selectedPartCodes);
+        resultAssert().assertSuccess();
+    }
+
+    private void assertNoSolution(String... selectedPartCodes) {
+        runWithSelectedParts(selectedPartCodes);
+        resultAssert().assertSolutionSizeEqual(0);
+    }
+
+    private void runWithSelectedParts(String... selectedPartCodes) {
+        InferParasReq req = new InferParasReq();
+        req.setModuleId(getModule().getId());
+        req.setEnumerateAllSolution(false);
+        req.setPrePartInsts(toPrePartInsts(selectedPartCodes));
+        Result<List<ModuleInst>> result = ModuleConstraintExecutor.INST.inferParas(req);
+        setResult(result);
+        setSolutions(result.getData());
+    }
+
+    private List<PartInst> toPrePartInsts(String... selectedPartCodes) {
+        List<String> pairs = new ArrayList<>();
+        for (String selectedPartCode : selectedPartCodes) {
+            pairs.add(selectedPartCode);
+            pairs.add("1");
+        }
+        return toPreParts(pairs.toArray(String[]::new));
+    }
+}
```
</details></tool-use>

# RFC-0007: з»“жһ„еҢ–и§„еҲҷдёҺз»„еҗҲи§„еҲҷ Schema

> зҠ¶жҖҒпјҡиҚүжЎҲпјҲDraftпјү
> ж—Ҙжңҹпјҡ2026-05-19
> зӣёе…іж–ҮжЎЈпјҡ`doc/CORE-DESIGN.md`, `doc/ACCEPTANCE.md`, `doc/RFC-0005-0.1-North-South-Interface-Decoupling-Patch.md`, `doc/RFC-0006-North-Interface-Refactor.md`, `doc/RFC-0008-Rule-Model-IR-Refactor.md`, `doc/RFC-0009-Optional-PartCategory-Whitelist-Guard.md`

---

## и®ҫи®ЎеҶізӯ–ж‘ҳиҰҒ

жң¬ RFC и®Ёи®әи§„еҲҷз»ҙжҠӨжҖҒе’Ңи®Ўз®—еј•ж“Һд№Ӣй—ҙзҡ„з»“жһ„еҢ–и§„еҲҷиЎЁиҫҫгҖӮзӣ®ж ҮжҳҜи®©дёҡеҠЎдәәе‘ҳеҸҜд»ҘйҖҡиҝҮиЎЁж јжҲ–жӢ–жӢҪжҺ§д»¶з»ҙжҠӨи§„еҲҷпјҢеҗҢж—¶и®Ўз®—еј•ж“Һд»Қз„¶жҠҠи§„еҲҷзј–иҜ‘дёә CP-SAT зәҰжқҹгҖӮ

| дё»йўҳ | еҶізӯ– |
| --- | --- |
| з»ҙжҠӨжҖҒиЎЁиҫҫ | ж–°еўһ `PairStructRuleSchema`гҖҒ`TripleStructRuleSchema` е’Ң `CombinationStructRuleSchema` |
| иЎЁиҫҫејҸзІ’еәҰ | дҪҝз”Ё `StructExprSchema` иЎЁзӨәвҖңеҜ№иұЎ + еұһжҖ§ + жҜ”иҫғз¬Ұ + еҖјвҖқ |
| зҲ¶еӯҗи§„еҲҷе…ізі» | жң¬ RFC д»Қе»әи®®ж–°еўһ `Rule.parentRuleCode`пјӣдёҚеӨҚз”ЁзҺ°жңү `Rule.fatherCode`пјҢеӣ дёәеҪ“еүҚд»Јз Ғдёӯ `fatherCode` е·ІиЎЁзӨәи§„еҲҷжҢӮиҪҪзҡ„ PartCategory |
| е…ізі»зұ»еһӢ | д»…дҝқз•ҷ `INCOMPATIBLE`гҖҒ`REQUIRES`гҖҒ`CO_DEPENDENT`пјӣ`CO_DEPENDENT` еҗҢж—¶иЎЁзӨәе…је®№/й…ҚеҘ—е…ізі» |
| иҝҗиЎҢжҖҒиЎЁиҫҫ | жң¬ RFC е»әи®®еңЁ `ModuleGenneratorByAnno` жһ„е»әж•°жҚ®еҗҺз”ҹжҲҗ `Rule.exeSchema = CodependantRuleSchema`пјӣеҪ“еүҚ `Rule` зұ»е°ҡжңӘеҢ…еҗ« `parentRuleCode` / `exeSchema` |
| еҚ—еҗ‘жҺҘеҸЈиҫ№з•Ң | з»“жһ„еҢ–и§„еҲҷжү§иЎҢеҷЁеұһдәҺеј•ж“ҺеҶ…йғЁиғҪеҠӣпјӣиӢҘзӨәдҫӢи§Ұиҫҫ CP е»әжЁЎпјҢеә”дҪҝз”Ё `ModuleCPModel`гҖҒ`AlgCPBoolVar`гҖҒ`AlgCPLiteral`гҖҒ`PartVar` зӯү facadeпјҢдёҚеҶҚеңЁдә§е“Ғз®—жі•/RFC зӨәдҫӢдёӯжҡҙйңІ OR-Tools `BoolVar` / `Literal` |
| зҷҪеҗҚеҚ•з»„еҗҲи§„еҲҷ | йҖүдёӯзҡ„йғЁд»¶з»„еҗҲеҝ…йЎ»е‘ҪдёӯиҮіе°‘дёҖжқЎе…Ғи®ёз»„еҗҲ |
| й»‘еҗҚеҚ•з»„еҗҲи§„еҲҷ | жҜҸжқЎзҰҒжӯўз»„еҗҲз”ҹжҲҗвҖңдёҚиғҪеҗҢж—¶йҖүдёӯвҖқзҡ„зәҰжқҹ |
| йҖ»иҫ‘е®ҢеӨҮжҖ§ | и®Ўз®—еј•ж“ҺеҸӘжү§иЎҢзЎ®е®ҡиҜӯд№үпјӣз»ҙжҠӨжҖҒе®ҢеӨҮжҖ§зӯ–з•ҘдёҚеңЁжң¬ RFC е»әжЁЎ |
| ж ЎйӘҢжҺҘеҸЈ | и§„еҲ’еңЁ `ModuleConstraintExecutor` ж–°еўһ `validate(ModuleValidateReq)`пјӣеҪ“еүҚжҺҘеҸЈд»ҚеҸӘжңү `init/fini/addModule/removeModule/inferParas/postCalculate` |
| дәҢе…ғ/дёүе…ғж”ҜжҢҒ | йҰ–жңҹж”ҜжҢҒдәҢе…ғе’Ңдёүе…ғпјӣжӣҙй«ҳе…ғеҸҜз”ұеҗҺз»ӯйҖҡз”Ё `NaryStructRuleSchema` жү©еұ• |

---

## 1. ж‘ҳиҰҒ

еҪ“еүҚи§„еҲҷжӣҙеҒҸеҗ‘д»Јз ҒејҸжҲ–е·Іжңүе…је®№и§„еҲҷ SchemaпјҢйҡҫд»Ҙж”Ҝж’‘е®ўжҲ·йҖҡиҝҮиЎЁж јеҢ–з•Ңйқўз»ҙжҠӨвҖңCPU ж ёж•° = 4 дёҚе…је®№зЎ¬зӣҳйҖҹзҺҮ = 5400вҖқиҝҷзұ»з»“жһ„еҢ–и§„еҲҷгҖӮжң¬ RFC жҸҗи®®еңЁ `Rule.rawCode` дёӯж–°еўһдәҢе…ғгҖҒдёүе…ғз»“жһ„еҢ–и§„еҲҷ SchemaпјҢе№¶еңЁ `ModuleGenneratorByAnno` жһ„е»әж•°жҚ®еҗҺеұ•ејҖдёә `CodependantRuleSchema`пјҢдҪҝз»ҙжҠӨжҖҒеҸҜиҜ»гҖҒиҝҗиЎҢжҖҒеҸҜжү§иЎҢгҖӮ

жң¬ж–Үе·ІжҢү `RFC-0005-0.1` еҗҺзҡ„еҚ—еҗ‘жҺҘеҸЈйҮҚжһ„еҲ·ж–°пјҡдә§е“Ғз®—жі•дҫ§е…ҘеҸЈжҳҜ `ModuleAlgBase.model()`пјҢCP иғҪеҠӣйҖҡиҝҮ `ModuleCPModel` / `AlgCP*` facade жҡҙйңІпјҢ`southinf` дёҚдҫқиө– `impl` еҢ…е’Ң OR-ToolsгҖӮз»“жһ„еҢ–з»„еҗҲи§„еҲҷжң¬иә«д»ҚжҳҜеј•ж“ҺеҶ…йғЁеҫ…е®һзҺ°иғҪеҠӣпјҢдҪҶйӘҢж”¶зӨәдҫӢе’Ңжү§иЎҢдјӘд»Јз ҒдёҚеҶҚдҪҝз”Ёж—§зҡ„ `ConstraintAlgBase` жҲ–зӣҙжҺҘ OR-Tools зұ»еһӢгҖӮ

---

## 2. еҠЁжңә

### 2.1 й—®йўҳиғҢжҷҜ

е®ўжҲ·зҡ„ејҖеҸ‘дәәе‘ҳеёҢжңӣз”Ёз»“жһ„еҢ–иЎЁж јз»ҙжҠӨи§„еҲҷпјҢиҖҢдёҚжҳҜзӣҙжҺҘзј–еҶҷ Java д»Јз ҒжҲ–иҮӘз”ұиЎЁиҫҫејҸгҖӮе…ёеһӢз•ҢйқўдәӨдә’еҰӮдёӢпјҡ

1. йҖүжӢ©е·ҰиЎЁиҫҫејҸпјҡеҜ№иұЎ `cpu`пјҢеұһжҖ§ `CoreNum`пјҢж“ҚдҪңз¬Ұ `=`пјҢеҖј `4`гҖӮ
2. йҖүжӢ©дёҡеҠЎе…ізі»пјҡдҫӢеҰӮвҖңдёҚе…је®№вҖқгҖӮ
3. йҖүжӢ©еҸіиЎЁиҫҫејҸпјҡеҜ№иұЎ `drive`пјҢеұһжҖ§ `Speed`пјҢж“ҚдҪңз¬Ұ `=`пјҢеҖј `5400`гҖӮ

иҝҷзұ»и§„еҲҷжң¬иҙЁдёҠжҳҜдёҖдёӘдәҢе…ғз»“жһ„еҢ–иЎЁиҫҫпјҡ

```text
cpu.CoreNum = 4  INCOMPATIBLE  drive.Speed = 5400
```

еҪ“еүҚзі»з»ҹдёӯ `Rule.rawCode` е·Із»Ҹж”ҜжҢҒ `CompatiableRuleSchema`гҖҒ`CodeRuleSchema`гҖҒ`CalculateRuleSchema` зӯүзұ»еһӢпјҢдҪҶзјәе°‘йқўеҗ‘ UI иЎЁж јз»ҙжҠӨзҡ„йҖҡз”Ёз»“жһ„еҢ–иЎЁиҫҫжЁЎеһӢгҖӮ

### 2.2 з®ҖеҚ•з»“жһ„еҢ–и§„еҲҷеңәжҷҜ

дёҡеҠЎи§„еҲҷпјҡ

```text
4 ж ё CPU дёҚе…је®№ 5400 иҪ¬зЎ¬зӣҳ
```

з»ҙжҠӨжҖҒжңҹжңӣпјҡ

```json
{
  "@type": "PairStructRule",
  "expr1": {
    "objectType": "PartCategory",
    "objectCode": "cpu",
    "attrCode": "CoreNum",
    "operator": "EQ",
    "values": ["4"]
  },
  "relationType": "INCOMPATIBLE",
  "expr2": {
    "objectType": "PartCategory",
    "objectCode": "drive",
    "attrCode": "Speed",
    "operator": "EQ",
```

# RFC й©ұеҠЁејҖеҸ‘е·ҘдҪңжөҒ

## жҰӮиҝ°

еҪ“з”ЁжҲ·иҰҒжұӮж №жҚ® RFC ж–ҮжЎЈиҝӣиЎҢејҖеҸ‘ж—¶пјҢжү§иЎҢд»ҘдёӢж ҮеҮҶеҢ–е·ҘдҪңжөҒгҖӮ

## е·ҘдҪңжөҒзЁӢ

### йҳ¶ж®ө 1пјҡзҗҶи§ЈйңҖжұӮ

1. иҜ»еҸ– RFC ж–ҮжЎЈпјҲеҰӮ `doc/RFC-XXXX-*.md`пјү
2. иҜ»еҸ– `doc/ACCEPTANCE.md` дәҶи§ЈйӘҢж”¶ж ҮеҮҶ
3. еҲҶжһҗи®ҫи®ЎиҰҒжұӮпјҢзЎ®е®ҡйңҖиҰҒдҝ®ж”№зҡ„ж–Үд»¶е’Ңд»Јз Ғ

### йҳ¶ж®ө 2пјҡд»Јз ҒејҖеҸ‘

1. ж №жҚ® RFC и®ҫи®Ўе®һзҺ°д»Јз Ғ
2. йҒөеҫӘйЎ№зӣ®д»Јз Ғи§„иҢғпјҲеҸӮи§Ғ `CLAUDE.md`пјү
3. зЎ®дҝқ Lombok жіЁи§ЈеӨ„зҗҶжӯЈзЎ®
4. Java жәҗз Ғзә§еҲ«пјҡ21пјҢжңҖеӨ§иЎҢй•ҝеәҰпјҡ120

### йҳ¶ж®ө 3пјҡжөӢиҜ•йӘҢиҜҒ

1. зј–еҶҷжөӢиҜ•з”ЁдҫӢпјҲеҸӮиҖғ `src/test/java/com/jmix/scenario/`пјү
2. дҪҝз”ЁжіЁи§Јй©ұеҠЁж–№ејҸе®ҡд№үжөӢиҜ•жЁЎеқ—пјҡ
   - `@ModuleAnno`, `@ParaAnno`, `@PartAnno`
   - `@CodeRuleAnno`, `@CompatiableRuleAnno`, `@PriorityRuleAnno`
3. иҝҗиЎҢжөӢиҜ•йӘҢиҜҒпјҡ
   ```bash
   mvn test -Dtest=YourTestClass
   ```
4. зЎ®дҝқзҺ°жңүжөӢиҜ•д№ҹиғҪйҖҡиҝҮпјҡ
   ```bash
   mvn test
   ```

### йҳ¶ж®ө 4пјҡиҮӘеҠЁжҸҗдәӨ

еҪ“жөӢиҜ•е…ЁйғЁйҖҡиҝҮеҗҺпјҡ

1. **еҲӣе»әж–°еҲҶж”Ҝ**пјҡ
   ```bash
   git checkout -b feature/rfc-XXXX-<short-description>
   ```

2. **жҸҗдәӨд»Јз Ғ**пјҡ
   ```bash
   git add .
   git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
   feat(rfc): implement RFC-XXXX feature name
   
   - ж №жҚ® RFC-XXXX ж–ҮжЎЈе®һзҺ°еҠҹиғҪ
   - ж·»еҠ жөӢиҜ•з”ЁдҫӢ
   - йҖҡиҝҮйӘҢж”¶жөӢиҜ•
   
   EOF
   )"
   ```

3. **жҺЁйҖҒеҲ°иҝңзЁӢ**пјҡ
   ```bash
   git push -u origin HEAD
   ```

## е…ій”®зәҰжқҹ

- **ж—Ҙеҝ—иҜӯиЁҖ**пјҡжүҖжңү log.info() еҝ…йЎ»дҪҝз”ЁиӢұж–Ү
- **дёӯж–ҮжіЁйҮҠ**пјҡJavaDoc е’ҢеҶ…иҒ”жіЁйҮҠеҸҜдҪҝз”Ёдёӯж–Ү
- **дёҚдҝ®ж”№еҺҹж–ҮжЎЈ**пјҡRFC ж–ҮжЎЈдҝқжҢҒдёҚеҸҳ
- **еҗ‘еҗҺе…је®№**пјҡзЎ®дҝқзҺ°жңүжөӢиҜ•дёҚеҸ—еҪұе“Қ

## еёёи§Ғ RFC ж–Үд»¶дҪҚзҪ®

- и®ҫи®Ўж–ҮжЎЈпјҡ`doc/RFC-*.md`
- йӘҢж”¶ж ҮеҮҶпјҡ`doc/ACCEPTANCE.md`
- ж ёеҝғи®ҫи®Ўпјҡ`doc/CORE-DESIGN.md`
- жөӢиҜ•зӣ®еҪ•пјҡ`src/test/java/com/jmix/scenario/`

## жҸҗдәӨж¶ҲжҒҜж јејҸ

```

- `refactor`пјҡйҮҚжһ„
- `test`пјҡжөӢиҜ•зӣёе…і
- `docs`пјҡж–ҮжЎЈжӣҙж–°

## AIиҜ„е®ЎжңәеҲ¶

еҪ“з”ЁжҲ·иҰҒжұӮгҖҢиҜ„е®ЎгҖҚжҲ–гҖҢе®ЎжҹҘгҖҚRFCж—¶пјҢжү§иЎҢд»ҘдёӢжөҒзЁӢпјҡ

1. **иҜ»еҸ– REVIEW_PROMPT.md** иҺ·еҸ–иҜ„е®ЎжЈҖжҹҘжё…еҚ•
2. **дҪҝз”Ё Task е·Ҙе…·и°ғз”Ёеӯҗд»ЈзҗҶ**пјҲgeneralPurposeжЁЎејҸпјүжү§иЎҢиҜ„е®Ў
3. **еӯҗд»ЈзҗҶиҜ»еҸ– RFC ж–ҮжЎЈ**пјҢжҢүз…§иҜ„е®Ўжё…еҚ•йҖҗйЎ№жЈҖжҹҘ
4. **иҫ“еҮәиҜ„е®ЎжҠҘе‘Ҡ**пјҢеҢ…еҗ«пјҡ
   - е®Ңж•ҙжҖ§жЈҖжҹҘ
   - дёҖиҮҙжҖ§жЈҖжҹҘ
   - еҸҜе®һзҺ°жҖ§иҜ„дј°
   - е…·дҪ“ж”№иҝӣе»әи®®

### и°ғз”ЁеӨ–йғЁAIиҜ„е®ЎзӨәдҫӢ

```
з”ЁжҲ·иҜҙ: "её®жҲ‘з”ЁеҸҰдёҖдёӘеӨ§жЁЎеһӢиҜ„е®ЎиҝҷдёӘRFC"

AIе“Қеә”:
   иҜ·зЎ®и®ӨдҪ еёҢжңӣдҪҝз”Ёе“ӘдёӘAIиҝӣиЎҢиҜ„е®Ўпјҹ
   - [ ] DeepSeek (еҪ“еүҚеҜ№иҜқ)
   - [ ] Claude (еҲӣе»әеӯҗд»ЈзҗҶ)
   - [ ] е…¶д»–
   
   йҖүжӢ©еҗҺпјҢжҲ‘е°ҶеҗҜеҠЁиҜ„е®ЎжөҒзЁӢ...
```

## RFC ж–ҮжЎЈе‘ҪеҗҚи§„иҢғ

```

# RFC-0007: з»“жһ„еҢ–и§„еҲҷдёҺз»„еҗҲи§„еҲҷ Schema

> зҠ¶жҖҒпјҡиҚүжЎҲпјҲDraftпјү
> ж—Ҙжңҹпјҡ2026-05-19
> зӣёе…іж–ҮжЎЈпјҡ`doc/CORE-DESIGN.md`, `doc/ACCEPTANCE.md`, `doc/RFC-0005-0.1-North-South-Interface-Decoupling-Patch.md`, `doc/RFC-0006-North-Interface-Refactor.md`, `doc/RFC-0008-Rule-Model-IR-Refactor.md`, `doc/RFC-0009-Optional-PartCategory-Whitelist-Guard.md`

---

## и®ҫи®ЎеҶізӯ–ж‘ҳиҰҒ

жң¬ RFC и®Ёи®әи§„еҲҷз»ҙжҠӨжҖҒе’Ңи®Ўз®—еј•ж“Һд№Ӣй—ҙзҡ„з»“жһ„еҢ–и§„еҲҷиЎЁиҫҫгҖӮзӣ®ж ҮжҳҜи®©дёҡеҠЎдәәе‘ҳеҸҜд»ҘйҖҡиҝҮиЎЁж јжҲ–жӢ–жӢҪжҺ§д»¶з»ҙжҠӨи§„еҲҷпјҢеҗҢж—¶и®Ўз®—еј•ж“Һд»Қз„¶жҠҠи§„еҲҷзј–иҜ‘дёә CP-SAT зәҰжқҹгҖӮ

| дё»йўҳ | еҶізӯ– |
| --- | --- |
| з»ҙжҠӨжҖҒиЎЁиҫҫ | ж–°еўһ `PairStructRuleSchema`гҖҒ`TripleStructRuleSchema` е’Ң `CombinationStructRuleSchema` |
| иЎЁиҫҫејҸзІ’еәҰ | дҪҝз”Ё `StructExprSchema` иЎЁзӨәвҖңеҜ№иұЎ + еұһжҖ§ + жҜ”иҫғз¬Ұ + еҖјвҖқ |
| зҲ¶еӯҗи§„еҲҷе…ізі» | жң¬ RFC д»Қе»әи®®ж–°еўһ `Rule.parentRuleCode`пјӣдёҚеӨҚз”ЁзҺ°жңү `Rule.fatherCode`пјҢеӣ дёәеҪ“еүҚд»Јз Ғдёӯ `fatherCode` е·ІиЎЁзӨәи§„еҲҷжҢӮиҪҪзҡ„ PartCategory |
| е…ізі»зұ»еһӢ | д»…дҝқз•ҷ `INCOMPATIBLE`гҖҒ`REQUIRES`гҖҒ`CO_DEPENDENT`пјӣ`CO_DEPENDENT` еҗҢж—¶иЎЁзӨәе…је®№/й…ҚеҘ—е…ізі» |
| иҝҗиЎҢжҖҒиЎЁиҫҫ | жң¬ RFC е»әи®®еңЁ `ModuleGenneratorByAnno` жһ„е»әж•°жҚ®еҗҺз”ҹжҲҗ `Rule.exeSchema = CodependantRuleSchema`пјӣеҪ“еүҚ `Rule` зұ»е°ҡжңӘеҢ…еҗ« `parentRuleCode` / `exeSchema` |
| еҚ—еҗ‘жҺҘеҸЈиҫ№з•Ң | з»“жһ„еҢ–и§„еҲҷжү§иЎҢеҷЁеұһдәҺеј•ж“ҺеҶ…йғЁиғҪеҠӣпјӣиӢҘзӨәдҫӢи§Ұиҫҫ CP е»әжЁЎпјҢеә”дҪҝз”Ё `ModuleCPModel`гҖҒ`AlgCPBoolVar`гҖҒ`AlgCPLiteral`гҖҒ`PartVar` зӯү facadeпјҢдёҚеҶҚеңЁдә§е“Ғз®—жі•/RFC зӨәдҫӢдёӯжҡҙйңІ OR-Tools `BoolVar` / `Literal` |
| зҷҪеҗҚеҚ•з»„еҗҲи§„еҲҷ | йҖүдёӯзҡ„йғЁд»¶з»„еҗҲеҝ…йЎ»е‘ҪдёӯиҮіе°‘дёҖжқЎе…Ғи®ёз»„еҗҲ |
| й»‘еҗҚеҚ•з»„еҗҲи§„еҲҷ | жҜҸжқЎзҰҒжӯўз»„еҗҲз”ҹжҲҗвҖңдёҚиғҪеҗҢж—¶йҖүдёӯвҖқзҡ„зәҰжқҹ |
| йҖ»иҫ‘е®ҢеӨҮжҖ§ | и®Ўз®—еј•ж“ҺеҸӘжү§иЎҢзЎ®е®ҡиҜӯд№үпјӣз»ҙжҠӨжҖҒе®ҢеӨҮжҖ§зӯ–з•ҘдёҚеңЁжң¬ RFC е»әжЁЎ |
| ж ЎйӘҢжҺҘеҸЈ | и§„еҲ’еңЁ `ModuleConstraintExecutor` ж–°еўһ `validate(ModuleValidateReq)`пјӣеҪ“еүҚжҺҘеҸЈд»ҚеҸӘжңү `init/fini/addModule/removeModule/inferParas/postCalculate` |
| дәҢе…ғ/дёүе…ғж”ҜжҢҒ | йҰ–жңҹж”ҜжҢҒдәҢе…ғе’Ңдёүе…ғпјӣжӣҙй«ҳе…ғеҸҜз”ұеҗҺз»ӯйҖҡз”Ё `NaryStructRuleSchema` жү©еұ• |

---

## 1. ж‘ҳиҰҒ

еҪ“еүҚи§„еҲҷжӣҙеҒҸеҗ‘д»Јз ҒејҸжҲ–е·Іжңүе…је®№и§„еҲҷ SchemaпјҢйҡҫд»Ҙж”Ҝж’‘е®ўжҲ·йҖҡиҝҮиЎЁж јеҢ–з•Ңйқўз»ҙжҠӨвҖңCPU ж ёж•° = 4 дёҚе…је®№зЎ¬зӣҳйҖҹзҺҮ = 5400вҖқиҝҷзұ»з»“жһ„еҢ–и§„еҲҷгҖӮжң¬ RFC жҸҗи®®еңЁ `Rule.rawCode` дёӯж–°еўһдәҢе…ғгҖҒдёүе…ғз»“жһ„еҢ–и§„еҲҷ SchemaпјҢе№¶еңЁ `ModuleGenneratorByAnno` жһ„е»әж•°жҚ®еҗҺеұ•ејҖдёә `CodependantRuleSchema`пјҢдҪҝз»ҙжҠӨжҖҒеҸҜиҜ»гҖҒиҝҗиЎҢжҖҒеҸҜжү§иЎҢгҖӮ

жң¬ж–Үе·ІжҢү `RFC-0005-0.1` еҗҺзҡ„еҚ—еҗ‘жҺҘеҸЈйҮҚжһ„еҲ·ж–°пјҡдә§е“Ғз®—жі•дҫ§е…ҘеҸЈжҳҜ `ModuleAlgBase.model()`пјҢCP иғҪеҠӣйҖҡиҝҮ `ModuleCPModel` / `AlgCP*` facade жҡҙйңІпјҢ`southinf` дёҚдҫқиө– `impl` еҢ…е’Ң OR-ToolsгҖӮз»“жһ„еҢ–з»„еҗҲи§„еҲҷжң¬иә«д»ҚжҳҜеј•ж“ҺеҶ…йғЁеҫ…е®һзҺ°иғҪеҠӣпјҢдҪҶйӘҢж”¶зӨәдҫӢе’Ңжү§иЎҢдјӘд»Јз ҒдёҚеҶҚдҪҝз”Ёж—§зҡ„ `ConstraintAlgBase` жҲ–зӣҙжҺҘ OR-Tools зұ»еһӢгҖӮ

---

## 2. еҠЁжңә

### 2.1 й—®йўҳиғҢжҷҜ

е®ўжҲ·зҡ„ејҖеҸ‘дәәе‘ҳеёҢжңӣз”Ёз»“жһ„еҢ–иЎЁж јз»ҙжҠӨи§„еҲҷпјҢиҖҢдёҚжҳҜзӣҙжҺҘзј–еҶҷ Java д»Јз ҒжҲ–иҮӘз”ұиЎЁиҫҫејҸгҖӮе…ёеһӢз•ҢйқўдәӨдә’еҰӮдёӢпјҡ

1. йҖүжӢ©е·ҰиЎЁиҫҫејҸпјҡеҜ№иұЎ `cpu`пјҢеұһжҖ§ `CoreNum`пјҢж“ҚдҪңз¬Ұ `=`пјҢеҖј `4`гҖӮ
2. йҖүжӢ©дёҡеҠЎе…ізі»пјҡдҫӢеҰӮвҖңдёҚе…је®№вҖқгҖӮ
3. йҖүжӢ©еҸіиЎЁиҫҫејҸпјҡеҜ№иұЎ `drive`пјҢеұһжҖ§ `Speed`пјҢж“ҚдҪңз¬Ұ `=`пјҢеҖј `5400`гҖӮ

иҝҷзұ»и§„еҲҷжң¬иҙЁдёҠжҳҜдёҖдёӘдәҢе…ғз»“жһ„еҢ–иЎЁиҫҫпјҡ

```text
cpu.CoreNum = 4  INCOMPATIBLE  drive.Speed = 5400
```

еҪ“еүҚзі»з»ҹдёӯ `Rule.rawCode` е·Із»Ҹж”ҜжҢҒ `CompatiableRuleSchema`гҖҒ`CodeRuleSchema`гҖҒ`CalculateRuleSchema` зӯүзұ»еһӢпјҢдҪҶзјәе°‘йқўеҗ‘ UI иЎЁж јз»ҙжҠӨзҡ„йҖҡз”Ёз»“жһ„еҢ–иЎЁиҫҫжЁЎеһӢгҖӮ

### 2.2 з®ҖеҚ•з»“жһ„еҢ–и§„еҲҷеңәжҷҜ

дёҡеҠЎи§„еҲҷпјҡ

```text
4 ж ё CPU дёҚе…је®№ 5400 иҪ¬зЎ¬зӣҳ
```

з»ҙжҠӨжҖҒжңҹжңӣпјҡ

```json
{
  "@type": "PairStructRule",
  "expr1": {
    "objectType": "PartCategory",
    "objectCode": "cpu",
    "attrCode": "CoreNum",
    "operator": "EQ",
    "values": ["4"]
  },
  "relationType": "INCOMPATIBLE",
  "expr2": {
    "objectType": "PartCategory",
    "objectCode": "drive",
    "attrCode": "Speed",
    "operator": "EQ",
    "values": ["5400"]
  }
}
```

иҝҗиЎҢжҖҒжңҹжңӣпјҡ

- иҝҮж»ӨеҮәжүҖжңү `CoreNum = 4` зҡ„ CPU йғЁд»¶гҖӮ
- иҝҮж»ӨеҮәжүҖжңү `Speed = 5400` зҡ„зЎ¬зӣҳйғЁд»¶гҖӮ
- еҜ№иҝҮж»Өз»“жһңдёӯзҡ„жҜҸдёӘдәҢе…ғз»„еҗҲз”ҹжҲҗдёҚе…је®№зәҰжқҹгҖӮ

### 2.3 з»„еҗҲи§„еҲҷеңәжҷҜ

дёҡеҠЎи§„еҲҷдёҚжҖ»жҳҜеҚ•жқЎдәҢе…ғе…ізі»пјҢиҖҢеҸҜиғҪжҳҜдёҖз»„еҝ…йЎ»ж•ҙдҪ“з»ҙжҠӨзҡ„еӯҗи§„еҲҷгҖӮдҫӢеҰӮ CPU дёҺзЎ¬зӣҳзҡ„й…ҚеҘ—зҷҪеҗҚеҚ•пјҡ

1. 4 ж ё CPU й…ҚеҘ— 5400 иҪ¬зЎ¬зӣҳгҖӮ
2. 8 ж ё CPU й…ҚеҘ— 7200 иҪ¬жҲ– 5400 иҪ¬зЎ¬зӣҳгҖӮ
3. 8 ж ёд»ҘдёҠ CPU еҝ…йЎ»й…ҚеҘ— 7200 иҪ¬зЎ¬зӣҳгҖӮ

иҝҷдёүжқЎеӯҗи§„еҲҷеұһдәҺеҗҢдёҖдёӘзҲ¶и§„еҲҷгҖӮж ЎйӘҢж—¶пјҢеҰӮжһңз”ЁжҲ·йҖүжӢ©дәҶ `cpu1(CoreNum=4)` е’Ң `drive1(Speed=5400)`пјҢзі»з»ҹйңҖиҰҒеңЁиҜҘз»„еҗҲи§„еҲҷйҮҢжЈҖжҹҘжҳҜеҗҰеӯҳеңЁдёҖжқЎеӯҗи§„еҲҷиғҪе
... (truncated)
```

 @Slf4j
 public final class ModuleGenneratorByAnno {
+    private static void expandStructRules(Module module, List<Rule> moduleRules) {
+        module.setRules(moduleRules);
+        module.init();
+        List<Rule> allRules = module.getAllRules();
+        Map<String, Rule> rulesByCode = allRules.stream()
+                .collect(Collectors.toMap(Rule::getCode, rule -> rule, (left, right) -> left, LinkedHashMap::new));
+
+        for (Rule rule : allRules) {
+            if (!Strings.isNullOrEmpty(rule.getParentRuleCode())) {
+                continue;
+            }
+            RuleSchema rawCode = rule.getRawCode();
+            if (rawCode instanceof CombinationStructRuleSchema combinationSchema) {
+                rule.setExeSchema(expandCombinationStructRule(module, rule, combinationSchema, rulesByCode));
+            } else if (rawCode instanceof PairStructRuleSchema pairSchema
+                    && pairSchema.getRelationType()
+                            == com.jmix.executor.bmodel.logic.BusinessRelationType.INCOMPATIBLE) {
+                rule.setExeSchema(expandPairStructRule(module, rule, pairSchema));
+            } else if (rawCode instanceof TripleStructRuleSchema tripleSchema
+                    && tripleSchema.getRelationType()
+                            == com.jmix.executor.bmodel.logic.BusinessRelationType.INCOMPATIBLE) {
+                rule.setExeSchema(expandTripleStructRule(module, rule, tripleSchema));
+            }
+        }
+    }
+
+    private static CodependantRuleSchema expandCombinationStructRule(Module module, Rule parentRule,
+            CombinationStructRuleSchema schema, Map<String, Rule> rulesByCode) {
+        validateStructArity(schema.getArity());
+        if (schema.getDimensionCategoryCodes() == null
+                || schema.getDimensionCategoryCodes().size() != schema.getArity()) {
+            throw new AlgLoaderException("Combination rule dimensions do not match arity: " + parentRule.getCode());
+        }
+
+        Map<String, Rule> subRules = new LinkedHashMap<>();
+        if (schema.getSubRuleCodes() != null) {
+            for 
... (truncated)

еҸҜйҖү PartCategory зҡ„ guard иҜӯд№үжң¬ RFC жҡӮдёҚе®һзҺ°пјҢе·Із”ұ `doc/RFC-0009-Optional-PartCategory-Whitelist-Guard.md` еҚ•зӢ¬и·ҹиёӘгҖӮеҪ“еүҚ `@PartAnno` д№ҹе°ҡжңӘеҢ…еҗ« `required` еӯ—ж®өпјҢRFC-0007 дёҚеңЁжӯӨеӨ„жү©еұ•еҲҶзұ»еҝ…йҖү/еҸҜйҖүжЁЎеһӢгҖӮ

### 3.13 еҢ—еҗ‘ validate ж ЎйӘҢжҺҘеҸЈ

и§„еҲ’еңЁ `ModuleConstraintExecutor` ж–°еўһ `validate(ModuleValidateReq)`пјҢз”ЁдәҺж ЎйӘҢдёҖдёӘе·Із»ҷе®ҡзҡ„й…ҚзҪ®з»„еҗҲжҳҜеҗҰж»Ўи¶іеҪ“еүҚ Module и§„еҲҷгҖӮе®ғйқўеҗ‘вҖңж ЎйӘҢзҺ°жңүй…ҚзҪ®жҳҜеҗҰ OKвҖқпјҢдёҚжҳҜдёәдәҶжһҡдёҫжҲ–жҺЁиҚҗж–°и§ЈгҖӮеҪ“еүҚжҺҘеҸЈе°ҡжңӘеҢ…еҗ«иҜҘж–№жі•пјҢжң¬иҠӮе®ҡд№үзҡ„жҳҜ RFC-0007 зҡ„зӣ®ж ҮеҪўжҖҒгҖӮ

```java
public interface ModuleConstraintExecutor {
    Result<ModuleValidateResp> validate(ModuleValidateReq req);
}

public class ModuleValidateReq {
    private Long moduleId;
    private String moduleCode;

    /**
     * еҫ…ж ЎйӘҢзҡ„й…ҚзҪ®е®һдҫӢгҖӮ
     * е…¶дёӯ PartInst.quantity / selectedгҖҒParaInst.value зӯүеӯ—ж®өиЎЁзӨәи°ғз”Ёж–№з»ҷе®ҡзҡ„з»„еҗҲгҖӮ
     */
    private ModuleInst moduleInst;
}

public class ModuleValidateResp {
    private boolean valid;
    private List<String> violatedRuleCodes = new ArrayList<>();
    private List<String> messages = new ArrayList<>();
}
```

зӨәдҫӢиҫ“е…Ҙпјҡ

```java
ModuleInst inst = new ModuleInst();
inst.addPartInst(partInst("cpu4", 1));
inst.addPartInst(partInst("drive5400", 1));

ModuleValidateReq req = new ModuleValidateReq();
req.setModuleCode("Server");
req.setModuleInst(inst);

Result<ModuleValidateResp> result = ModuleConstraintExecutor.INST.validate(req);
```

ж ЎйӘҢиҜӯд№үпјҡ

- `validate` дҪҝз”Ёз»ҷе®ҡ `ModuleInst` дҪңдёәеӣәе®ҡиҫ“е…ҘпјҢе°Ҷе…¶дёӯзҡ„йғЁд»¶ж•°йҮҸгҖҒйҖүдёӯзҠ¶жҖҒгҖҒеҸӮж•°еҖјиҪ¬жҲҗиҫ“е…ҘзәҰжқҹгҖӮ
- еҰӮжһң CP-SAT еңЁиҝҷдәӣеӣәе®ҡиҫ“е…ҘдёӢд»ҚжңүеҸҜиЎҢи§ЈпјҢеҲҷ `valid=true`гҖӮ
- еҰӮжһңж— еҸҜиЎҢи§ЈпјҢеҲҷ `valid=false`пјҢиҝ”еӣһиҝқеҸҚзҡ„и§„еҲҷ codeпјӣиӢҘејҖеҗҜжқҫејӣиҜҠж–ӯпјҢеҸҜеӨҚз”ЁзҺ°жңүжқҫејӣеҸҳйҮҸе®ҡдҪҚеҶІзӘҒи§„еҲҷгҖӮ
- еҜ№з»„еҗҲи§„еҲҷиҖҢиЁҖпјҢзҷҪеҗҚеҚ•е‘ҪдёӯеҲҷйҖҡиҝҮпјҢжңӘе‘ҪдёӯеҲҷеӨұиҙҘпјӣй»‘еҗҚеҚ•е‘ҪдёӯеҲҷеӨұиҙҘпјҢжңӘе‘ҪдёӯеҲҷйҖҡиҝҮгҖӮ

йңҖиҰҒжіЁж„Ҹпјҡж ЎйӘҢиҫ“е…ҘеҸҜиғҪдёҚд»…жҳҜ selected зҠ¶жҖҒпјҢд№ҹеҸҜиғҪеҢ…еҗ«ж•°йҮҸпјҢдҫӢеҰӮ `cpu1.quantity=1`гҖҒ`drive2.quantity=2`гҖӮеӣ жӯӨиҜ·жұӮдҪ“йҖүжӢ©еӨҚз”Ё `ModuleInst`пјҢиҖҢдёҚжҳҜеҸӘдј  part code еҲ—иЎЁгҖӮ

### 3.14 зӢ¬з«ӢдәҢе…ғ/дёүе…ғи§„еҲҷжү§иЎҢ

йқһз»„еҗҲзҲ¶и§„еҲҷзҡ„ `PairStructRuleSchema` / `TripleStructRuleSchema` еҸҜд»ҘзӣҙжҺҘжү§иЎҢпјҡ

| relationType | дәҢе…ғжү§иЎҢиҜӯд№ү |
| --- | --- |
| `INCOMPATIBLE` | еҜ№еұ•ејҖеҗҺзҡ„жҜҸдёӘдәҢе…ғз»„еҗҲз”ҹжҲҗ `a.S + b.S <= 1` |
| `REQUIRES` | еҜ№еұ•ејҖеҗҺзҡ„йӣҶеҗҲз”ҹжҲҗ `leftCond -> rightCond`пјҢеӨҚз”ЁзҺ°жңүе…је®№и§„еҲҷжҖқжғі |
| `CO_DEPENDENT` | еҜ№еұ•ејҖеҗҺзҡ„йӣҶеҗҲз”ҹжҲҗеҸҢеҗ‘еҗҢйҖүе…ізі» |

дёүе…ғзӢ¬з«Ӣи§„еҲҷйҰ–жңҹе»әи®®еҸӘж”ҜжҢҒ `INCOMPATIBLE`пјҡ

```text
a.S + b.S + c.S <= 2
```

дёүе…ғ `REQUIRES` е’Ң `CO_DEPENDENT` зҡ„дёҡеҠЎиҜӯд№үе®№жҳ“жӯ§д№үпјҢеә”еңЁз»ҙжҠӨжҖҒжҲ–еҗҺз»ӯ RFC дёӯжҳҺзЎ®гҖӮ

дёҺеҪ“еүҚ `CompatiableRuleSchema.Operator` зҡ„е…ізі»пјҡ

- `INCOMPATIBLE` еҜ№еә”зҺ°жңү `CompatiableRuleSchema.Operator.INCOMPATIBLE`гҖӮ
- `REQUIRES` еҜ№еә”зҺ°жңү `CompatiableRuleSchema.Operator.REQUIRES`гҖӮ
- `CO_DEPENDENT` еҜ№еә”зҺ°жңү `CompatiableRuleSchema.Operator.CO_REFENT`пјҢе…¶дёӯ `CO_REFENT` жҳҜеҪ“еүҚд»Јз Ғдёӯзҡ„еҺҶеҸІжӢјеҶҷпјҢз»“жһ„еҢ–и§„еҲҷеҜ№еӨ–е»әи®®дҪҝз”ЁиҜӯд№үжӣҙжё…жҷ°зҡ„ `CO_DEPENDENT`гҖӮ

### 3.15 з»ҙжҠӨжҖҒе”ҜдёҖжҖ§зәҰжқҹ

и®Ўз®—еј•ж“ҺеұӮйқўдёҚйҷҗеҲ¶еҗҢдёҖз»ҙеәҰз»„еҗҲи§„еҲҷж•°йҮҸпјӣз»ҙжҠӨжҖҒйңҖиҰҒзәҰжқҹгҖӮ

дәҢе…ғз»„еҗҲи§„еҲҷй»ҳи®Өе”ҜдёҖй”®пјҡ

## 4. йӘҢж”¶еҮҶеҲҷ

### 4.1 еҠҹиғҪйӘҢж”¶з”ЁдҫӢ

е»әи®®ж–°еўһжөӢиҜ•ж–Үд»¶пјҡ

```text
src/test/java/com/jmix/scenario/ruletest/StructCombinationRuleTest.java
```

жөӢиҜ•ж•°жҚ®дҝқжҢҒжһҒз®Җпјҡ

```java
@ModuleAnno(id = 7007)
@AlgorithmApiVersion(southApiVersion = "1.0", algorithmVersion = "rfc-0007-test")
public static class StructCombinationConstraint extends ModuleAlgBase {

    @PartAnno(code = "cpu")
    @DAttrAnno1(code = "CoreNum", options = {
            "Core_4:4",
            "Core_8:8",
            "Core_12:12"
    })
    private PartCategoryVar cpu;

    @PartAnno(fatherCode = "cpu", attrs = {"4"})
    private PartVar cpu4;

    @PartAnno(fatherCode = "cpu", attrs = {"8"})
    private PartVar cpu8;

    @PartAnno(fatherCode = "cpu", attrs = {"12"})
    private PartVar cpu12;

    @PartAnno(code = "drive")
    @DAttrAnno1(code = "Speed", options = {
            "Speed_5400:5400",
            "Speed_7200:7200",
            "Speed_7000:7000"
    })
    private PartCategoryVar drive;

    @PartAnno(fatherCode = "drive", attrs = {"5400"})
    private PartVar drive5400;

    @PartAnno(fatherCode = "drive", attrs = {"7200"})
    private PartVar drive7200;

    @PartAnno(fatherCode = "drive", attrs = {"7000"})
    private PartVar drive7000;
}
```

#### AC-001: дәҢе…ғз»“жһ„еҢ–дёҚе…је®№и§„еҲҷ

зӣ®зҡ„пјҡйӘҢиҜҒ `cpu.CoreNum = 4 INCOMPATIBLE drive.Speed = 5400` еҸҜд»Ҙиў«зј–иҜ‘дёәдәҢе…ғдёҚе…је®№зәҰжқҹгҖӮ

```java
@Test
public void testPairStructRule_Incompatible() {
    installRule(pairStructRule(
            expr("cpu", "CoreNum", EQ, "4"),
            INCOMPATIBLE,
            expr("drive", "Speed", EQ, "5400")));

    inferRecommendModule("cpu:code=cpu4,drive:code=drive5400");
    resultAssert().assertSolutionSizeEqual(0);

    inferRecommendModule("cpu:code=cpu4,drive:code=drive7200");
    resultAssert().assertSuccess();
}
```

#### AC-002: дәҢе…ғз»„еҗҲзҷҪеҗҚеҚ•

зӣ®зҡ„пјҡйӘҢиҜҒзҷҪеҗҚеҚ•з»„еҗҲдёӯеҝ…йЎ»е‘ҪдёӯиҮіе°‘дёҖжқЎеӯҗи§„еҲҷгҖӮ

жөӢиҜ•з»„еҗҲпјҡ

| иҫ“е…Ҙ | йў„жңҹ |
| --- | --- |
| `cpu4 + drive5400` | йҖҡиҝҮ |
| `cpu4 + drive7200` | дёҚйҖҡиҝҮ |
| `cpu8 + drive5400` | йҖҡиҝҮ |
| `cpu8 + drive7200` | йҖҡиҝҮ |
| `cpu12 + drive5400` | дёҚйҖҡиҝҮ |
| `cpu12 + drive7200` | йҖҡиҝҮ |

```java
@Test
public void testCombinationWhiteList_Pair() {
    installRule(cpuDriveWhiteListRule());

    assertPass("cpu:code=cpu4,drive:code=drive5400");
    assertNoSolution("cpu:code=cpu4,drive:code=drive7200");
    assertPass("cpu:code=cpu8,drive:code=drive5400");
    assertPass("cpu:code=cpu8,drive:code=drive7200");
    assertNoSolution("cpu:code=cpu12,drive:code=drive5400");
    assertPass("cpu:code=cpu12,drive:code=drive7200");
}
```

#### AC-003: дәҢе…ғз»„еҗҲй»‘еҗҚеҚ•

зӣ®зҡ„пјҡйӘҢиҜҒй»‘еҗҚеҚ•е‘Ҫдёӯз»„еҗҲдјҡиў«зҰҒжӯўпјҢжңӘе‘Ҫдёӯзҡ„з»„еҗҲй»ҳи®Өе…Ғи®ёгҖӮ

```java
@Test
public void testCombinationBlackList_Pair() {
    installRule(blackListRule(
            pair(expr("cpu", "CoreNum", EQ, "4"),
                    INCOMPATIBLE,
                    expr("drive", "Speed", EQ, "7000"))));

    assertNoSolution("cpu:code=cpu4,drive:code=drive7000");
    assertPass("cpu:code=cpu4,drive:code=drive5400");
    assertPass("cpu:code=cpu8,drive:code=drive7000");
}
```

#### AC-004: дёүе…ғз»„еҗҲзҷҪеҗҚеҚ•

зӣ®зҡ„пјҡйӘҢиҜҒдёүе…ғз»“жһ„еҢ–и§„еҲҷеҸҜд»Ҙеұ•ејҖдёәдёүе…ғ `PartCombination` е№¶жү§иЎҢзҷҪеҗҚеҚ•гҖӮ

```java
@Test
public void testCombinationWhiteList_Triple() {
    installRule(cpuDriveMonitorWhiteListRule(
            triple(expr("cpu", "CoreNum", EQ, "8"),
                    CO_DEPENDENT,
                    expr("drive", "Speed", EQ, "7200"),
                    expr("monitor", "Resolution", EQ, "4K"))));

    assertPass("cpu:code=cpu8,drive:code=drive7200,monitor:code=monitor4k");
    assertNoSolution("cpu:code=cpu8,drive:code=drive5400,monitor:code=monitor4k");
}
```

## 6. йЈҺйҷ©дёҺе…је®№зӯ–з•Ҙ

### 6.1 `fatherCode` иҜӯд№үеҶІзӘҒ

йЈҺйҷ©пјҡз”ЁжҲ·еҲқзЁҝдёӯжҸҗеҲ°з”Ё `fatherCode` иЎЁзӨәеӯҗи§„еҲҷпјҢдҪҶзҺ°жңү `Rule.fatherCode` е·ІиЎЁзӨәи§„еҲҷжҢӮиҪҪдҪҚзҪ®гҖӮ

зӯ–з•Ҙпјҡж–°еўһ `parentRuleCode` иЎЁзӨәи§„еҲҷзҲ¶еӯҗе…ізі»пјҢдҝқз•ҷ `fatherCode` еҺҹиҜӯд№үгҖӮ

### 6.2 е…ізі»зұ»еһӢе‘ҪеҗҚе…је®№йЈҺйҷ©

йЈҺйҷ©пјҡдёҡеҠЎдәәе‘ҳеҸҜиғҪд»ҚдҪҝз”ЁвҖңе…је®№вҖқвҖңй…ҚеҘ—вҖқиЎЁиҫҫе…ізі»пјҢдҪҶжЁЎеһӢдёӯдёҚеҶҚдҝқз•ҷ `COMPATIBLE` жһҡдёҫгҖӮ

зӯ–з•Ҙпјҡз»ҙжҠӨжҖҒеұ•зӨәж–ҮжЎҲеҸҜд»Ҙз»§з»ӯеҸ«вҖңе…је®№/й…ҚеҘ—вҖқпјҢдҪҶжҢҒд№…еҢ–е’Ңжү§иЎҢжЁЎеһӢз»ҹдёҖеҶҷе…Ҙ `CO_DEPENDENT`гҖӮ

### 6.3 зҷҪеҗҚеҚ•еҸҜиғҪиҝҮеәҰзәҰжқҹеҸҜйҖүеҲҶзұ»

йЈҺйҷ©пјҡеҰӮжһңеҸӮдёҺз»„еҗҲзҡ„еҲҶзұ»дёҚжҳҜеҝ…йҖүпјҢзӣҙжҺҘиҰҒжұӮе‘ҪдёӯзҷҪеҗҚеҚ•дјҡи®©вҖңжңӘйҖүжӢ©иҜҘеҲҶзұ»вҖқзҡ„й…ҚзҪ®ж— и§ЈгҖӮ

зӯ–з•Ҙпјҡжң¬ RFC жҡӮдёҚе®һзҺ°еҸҜйҖүеҲҶзұ» guard иҜӯд№үпјҢиҜҘй—®йўҳе·ІжӢҶеҲҶеҲ° `RFC-0009`гҖӮ

### 6.4 з»„еҗҲж•°йҮҸиҶЁиғҖ

йЈҺйҷ©пјҡз»“жһ„еҢ–иЎЁиҫҫеұ•ејҖдёәз¬ӣеҚЎе°”з§ҜеҗҺпјҢз»„еҗҲж•°йҮҸеҸҜиғҪеҫҲеӨ§гҖӮ

зӯ–з•Ҙпјҡ

- жһ„е»әжңҹеҹәдәҺ Module йқҷжҖҒж•°жҚ®еұ•ејҖе№¶еҺ»йҮҚгҖӮ
- иҝҗиЎҢжңҹеҰӮжһңиҜ·жұӮжҖҒиҝҮж»ӨеҜјиҮҙ tuple дёӯжҹҗдёӘ part code дёҚеӯҳеңЁдәҺеҪ“еүҚжұӮи§ЈжЁЎеһӢзҡ„йғЁд»¶еҸҳйҮҸжҳ е°„дёӯпјҢиҜҘ tuple дёҚеҸӮдёҺ matchгҖӮ
- еҜ№з»„еҗҲеҺ»йҮҚгҖӮ
- еҜ№й»‘еҗҚеҚ•жҢү tuple з”ҹжҲҗзәҝжҖ§зәҰжқҹгҖӮ
- еҜ№зҷҪеҗҚеҚ•дјҳе…ҲдҪҝз”Ё tuple match ORпјҢиҖҢдёҚжҳҜз”ҹжҲҗе…ЁйӣҶиЎҘйӣҶй»‘еҗҚеҚ•гҖӮ
- з»ҙжҠӨжҖҒжҸҗдҫӣз»„еҗҲж•°йҮҸйў„дј°пјҢи¶…иҝҮйҳҲеҖјз»ҷеҮәиӯҰе‘ҠгҖӮ

### 6.5 еӨҡе®һдҫӢеҲҶзұ»иҜӯд№үеӨҚжқӮ

йЈҺйҷ©пјҡ`drive` ж”ҜжҢҒеӨҡе®һдҫӢж—¶пјҢеҗҢдёҖи§„еҲҷйңҖиҰҒдҪңз”ЁдәҺжҜҸдёӘе®һдҫӢпјҢиҝҳжҳҜи·Ёе®һдҫӢж•ҙдҪ“дҪңз”ЁпјҢйңҖиҰҒдёҡеҠЎзЎ®и®ӨгҖӮ

зӯ–з•ҘпјҡйҰ–жңҹдёҚдҪңдёә P0 иҢғеӣҙпјҢдҪңдёәеҗҺз»ӯеҚ•зӢ¬ RFC и®ҫи®Ўе’Ңи·ҹиёӘгҖӮ

---

| `COMPATIBLE` дёҺ `CO_DEPENDENT` | еҸӘдҝқз•ҷ `CO_DEPENDENT`пјҢдёҡеҠЎдёҠзҡ„вҖңе…је®№/й…ҚеҘ—вҖқз»ҹдёҖжҳ е°„еҲ° `CO_DEPENDENT` |

package com.jmix.executor.cmodel;

import com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonIgnore;
import com.google.common.base.Strings;

import lombok.Data;
import lombok.EqualsAndHashCode;

import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.List;

/**
 * жЁЎеқ—е®һдҫӢзұ»
 * иЎЁзӨәжЁЎеқ—зҡ„дёҖдёӘе…·дҪ“е®һдҫӢпјҢеҢ…еҗ«еҸӮж•°е®һдҫӢе’ҢйғЁд»¶е®һдҫӢ
 *
 * @since 2025-09-22
 */
@Data
@EqualsAndHashCode(callSuper = true)
public class ModuleInst extends ModuleBaseInst {

    /**
     * й»ҳи®Өе®һдҫӢй…ҚзҪ®IDеёёйҮҸ
     */
    public static final String DEFAULT_INSTANCE_CONFIG_ID = "0";

    /**
     * й»ҳи®Өж•°йҮҸеёёйҮҸ
     */
    public static final int DEFAULT_QUANTITY = 1;

    /**
     * жЁЎеқ—ID
     */
    private Long id;

    /**
     * е®һдҫӢй…ҚзҪ®ID
     */
    private String instanceConfigId = DEFAULT_INSTANCE_CONFIG_ID;

    /**
     * ж•°йҮҸ
     */
    private Integer quantity = DEFAULT_QUANTITY;

    /**
     * йғЁд»¶еҲҶзұ»е®һдҫӢеҲ—иЎЁ
     */
    private List<PartCategoryInst> partCategorys = new ArrayList<>();

    /**
     * дјҳе…Ҳзә§еұһжҖ§еҖјеҲ—иЎЁ
     * жҜҸдёӘзәҰжқҹзҡ„еҖј
     */
    private List<PriorityAttrValue> priorityAttrValues = new ArrayList<>();

    /**
     * дјҳе…Ҳзә§жҺ’еәҸеҸ·
     */
    private int prioritySortNo = 0;

    /**
     * дјҳе…Ҳзә§з»јеҗҲеҖј
     * жңҖеҗҺз»јеҗҲзҡ„еҖј
     */
    private double priorityOverallValue = 0.0;

    /**
     * иҺ·еҸ–жүҖжңүйғЁд»¶е®һдҫӢпјҲеҪ“еүҚеұӮ + жүҖжңүеӯҗPartCategoryInstзҡ„йғЁд»¶пјү
     *
     * @return жүҖжңүйғЁд»¶е®һдҫӢеҲ—иЎЁ
     */
    @JsonIgnore
    public List<PartInst> getAllParts() {
        List<PartInst> allParts = new ArrayList<>();
        // ж·»еҠ еҪ“еүҚеұӮзҡ„йғЁд»¶
        allParts.addAll(getParts());
        // йҖ’еҪ’ж·»еҠ жүҖжңүеӯҗPartCategoryInstзҡ„йғЁд»¶
        for (PartCategoryInst partCategoryInst : partCategorys) {
            allParts.addAll(partCategoryInst.getAllParts());
        }
        return allParts;
    }

    /**
     * иҺ·еҸ–жүҖжңүйғЁд»¶еҲҶзұ»е®һдҫӢ
     *
     * @return жүҖжңүйғЁд»¶еҲҶзұ»е®һдҫӢеҲ—иЎЁ
     */
    @JsonIgnore
    public List<PartCategoryInst> getAllPartCategorys() {
        List<PartCategoryInst> allPartCategorys = new ArrayList<>();
        for (PartCategoryInst partCategoryInst : partCategorys) {
            allPartCategorys.add(partCategoryInst);
            allPartCategorys.addAll(partCategoryInst.getAllPartCategorys());
        }
        return allPartCategorys;
    }

    /**
     * ж·»еҠ йғЁд»¶еҲҶзұ»е®һдҫӢ
     *
     * @param partCategoryInst йғЁд»¶еҲҶзұ»е®һдҫӢ
     */
    public void addPartCategoryInst(PartCategoryInst partCategoryInst) {
        partCategorys.add(partCategoryInst);
    }

    /**
     * ж №жҚ®йғЁд»¶д»Јз ҒжҹҘиҜўйғЁд»¶е®һдҫӢпјҲд»ҺжүҖжңүйғЁд»¶дёӯжҹҘиҜўпјү
     *
     * @param partCode йғЁд»¶д»Јз Ғ
     * @return йғЁд»¶е®һдҫӢпјҢеҰӮжһңдёҚеӯҳеңЁеҲҷиҝ”еӣһnull
     */
    @JsonIgnore
    public PartInst queryPart(String partCategoryCode, int instId, String partCode) {
        // е…ҲеңЁеҪ“еүҚеұӮжҹҘжүҫ
        if (Strings.isNullOrEmpty(partCategoryCode)) {
            return super.queryPart(partCode);
        }
        // еңЁеҪ“еүҚеұӮжҹҘжүҫ
        for (PartCategoryInst partCategoryInst : partCategorys) {
            if (partCategoryInst.getCode().equals(partCategoryCode) && partCategoryInst.getInstanceId() == instId) {
                return partCategoryInst.queryPart(partCode);
            }
        }
        return null;
    }

    /**
     * ж·»еҠ дјҳе…Ҳзә§еұһжҖ§еҖјдҝЎжҒҜеҲ°еӯ—з¬ҰдёІжһ„е»әеҷЁ
     * ж јејҸпјҡPAs(CA:100,TA:200,....)пјҢattrCodeеҸ–еүҚдёӨдҪҚзҡ„еӨ§еҶҷеӯ—з¬Ұ
     *
     * @param sb еӯ—з¬ҰдёІжһ„е»әеҷЁ
     */
    public void appendPriorityAttrValuesInfo(StringBuilder sb) {
        sb.append(" PO:").append(priorityOverallValue);
        sb.append(" PS:").append(prioritySortNo);
        if (priorityAttrValues == null || priorityAttrValues.isEmpty()) {
            return;
        }
        if (sb.length() > 0) {
            sb.append(",");
        }
        sb.append("PAs(");
        boolean first = true;
        for (PriorityAttrValue priorityAttrValue : priorityAttrValues) {
            if (!first) {
                sb.append(",");
            }
            String shortCode = toAttrShortCode(priorityAttrValue.getAttrCode());
            sb.append(shortCode).append(":").append(priorityAttrValue.getOptimalValue());
            first = false;
        }
        sb.append(")");

package com.jmix.tool.bbuilder.anno;

import com.jmix.executor.bmodel.logic.CalcStage;
import com.jmix.executor.bmodel.logic.PartCombinationType;

import java.lang.annotation.ElementType;
import java.lang.annotation.Retention;
import java.lang.annotation.RetentionPolicy;
import java.lang.annotation.Target;

/**
 * Annotation for declaring a structured combination parent rule.
 */
@Target(ElementType.METHOD)
@Retention(RetentionPolicy.RUNTIME)
public @interface CombinationStructRuleAnno {
    String code() default "";

    String normalNaturalCode() default "";

    String fatherCode() default "";

    int arity();

    String[] dimensionCategoryCodes();

    PartCombinationType combinationType() default PartCombinationType.WHITE;

    String[] subRuleCodes() default {};

    CalcStage calcStage() default CalcStage.MID;
}
package com.jmix.tool.bbuilder.anno;

import com.jmix.executor.bmodel.logic.BusinessRelationType;
import com.jmix.executor.bmodel.logic.CalcStage;
import com.jmix.executor.bmodel.logic.StructCompareOperator;

import java.lang.annotation.ElementType;
import java.lang.annotation.Retention;
import java.lang.annotation.RetentionPolicy;
import java.lang.annotation.Target;

/**
 * Annotation for declaring a binary structured rule in product metadata.
 */
@Target(ElementType.METHOD)
@Retention(RetentionPolicy.RUNTIME)
public @interface PairStructRuleAnno {
    /**
     * Rule code. Defaults to the annotated method name.
     */
    String code() default "";

    String normalNaturalCode() default "";

    String fatherCode() default "";

    /**
     * Parent combination rule code when this rule is a combination child.
     */
    String parentRuleCode() default "";

    String expr1ObjectCode();

    String expr1AttrCode();

    StructCompareOperator expr1Operator() default StructCompareOperator.EQ;

    String[] expr1Values();

    BusinessRelationType relationType() default BusinessRelationType.CO_DEPENDENT;

    String expr2ObjectCode();

    String expr2AttrCode();

    StructCompareOperator expr2Operator() default StructCompareOperator.EQ;

    String[] expr2Values();

    CalcStage calcStage() default CalcStage.MID;
}
package com.jmix.tool.bbuilder.anno;

import com.jmix.executor.bmodel.logic.BusinessRelationType;
import com.jmix.executor.bmodel.logic.CalcStage;
import com.jmix.executor.bmodel.logic.StructCompareOperator;

import java.lang.annotation.ElementType;
import java.lang.annotation.Retention;
import java.lang.annotation.RetentionPolicy;
import java.lang.annotation.Target;

/**
 * Annotation for declaring a ternary structured rule in product metadata.
 */
@Target(ElementType.METHOD)
@Retention(RetentionPolicy.RUNTIME)
public @interface TripleStructRuleAnno {
    String code() default "";

    String normalNaturalCode() default "";

    String fatherCode() default "";

    String parentRuleCode() default "";

    String expr1ObjectCode();

    String expr1AttrCode();

    StructCompareOperator expr1Operator() default StructCompareOperator.EQ;

    String[] expr1Values();

    BusinessRelationType relationType() default BusinessRelationType.CO_DEPENDENT;

    String expr2ObjectCode();

    String expr2AttrCode();

    StructCompareOperator expr2Operator() default StructCompareOperator.EQ;

    String[] expr2Values();

    String expr3ObjectCode();

    String expr3AttrCode();

    StructCompareOperator expr3Operator() default StructCompareOperator.EQ;

    String[] expr3Values();

    CalcStage calcStage() default CalcStage.MID;
}

    /**
     * и§„еҲҷиЎЁиҫҫиҢғејҸзұ»еһӢе…ЁеҗҚ
     * дҫӢеҰӮпјҡCDSL.V5.Struct.CompatiableRule
     */
    private String ruleSchemaTypeFullName;

    /**
     * зҲ¶йғЁд»¶зј–з Ғ
     * еҰӮжһңдёәз©әеӯ—з¬ҰдёІпјҢеҲҷи§„еҲҷж·»еҠ еҲ° Module дёӯпјӣеҗҰеҲҷж·»еҠ еҲ°еҜ№еә”зҡ„ PartCategory дёӯ
     */
    private String fatherCode = "";

    /**
     * з»„еҗҲи§„еҲҷзҲ¶и§„еҲҷ codeгҖӮдёәз©әиЎЁзӨәзӢ¬з«Ӣи§„еҲҷжҲ–з»„еҗҲзҲ¶и§„еҲҷгҖӮ
     */
    private String parentRuleCode = "";

    /**
     * з»“жһ„еҢ–и§„еҲҷзј–иҜ‘еҗҺзҡ„иҝҗиЎҢжҖҒ SchemaгҖӮ
     */
    private RuleSchema exeSchema;

    /**
     * и®Ўз®—йҳ¶ж®ө
     * з”ЁдәҺжҢҮе®ҡи§„еҲҷеңЁе“ӘдёӘи®Ўз®—йҳ¶ж®өжү§иЎҢ
     */
    private CalcStage calcStage = CalcStage.MID;

    /**
     * е·Ұдҫ§еҹәж•°
     */
    private Cardinality leftCardinality = Cardinality.ONE;

    /**
     * еҸідҫ§еҹәж•°
     */
    private Cardinality rightCardinality = Cardinality.ONE;

    /**
     * дҪңз”ЁиҢғеӣҙ
     */
    private EffectScope effectScope = EffectScope.SingleInst;

    /**
     * иҺ·еҸ–и§„еҲҷе·Ұдҫ§еј•з”Ёзҡ„зј–зЁӢеҜ№иұЎеҲ—иЎЁ
     * 
     * @return е·Ұдҫ§еј•з”Ёзҡ„зј–зЁӢеҜ№иұЎеҲ—иЎЁ
     */
    @JsonIgnore
    public List<RefProgObjSchema> getFromLeftProgObjs() {
        if (rawCode == null) {
            return new ArrayList<>();
        }
        return rawCode.getFromLeftProgObjs();
    }

    /**
     * иҺ·еҸ–и§„еҲҷеҸідҫ§еј•з”Ёзҡ„зј–зЁӢеҜ№иұЎеҲ—иЎЁ
```

-еҪ“еүҚи§„еҲҷжӣҙеҒҸеҗ‘д»Јз ҒејҸжҲ–е·Іжңүе…је®№и§„еҲҷ SchemaпјҢйҡҫд»Ҙж”Ҝж’‘е®ўжҲ·йҖҡиҝҮиЎЁж јеҢ–з•Ңйқўз»ҙжҠӨвҖңCPU ж ёж•° = 4 дёҚе…је®№зЎ¬зӣҳйҖҹзҺҮ = 5400вҖқиҝҷзұ»з»“жһ„еҢ–и§„еҲҷгҖӮжң¬ RFC жҸҗи®®еңЁ `Rule.rawCode` дёӯж–°еўһдәҢе…ғгҖҒдёүе…ғз»“жһ„еҢ–и§„еҲҷ SchemaпјҢе№¶еңЁ `ModuleGenneratorByAnno` жһ„е»әж•°жҚ®еҗҺеұ•ејҖдёә `CodependantRuleSchema`пјҢдҪҝз»ҙжҠӨжҖҒеҸҜиҜ»гҖҒиҝҗиЎҢжҖҒеҸҜжү§иЎҢгҖӮ
+еҪ“еүҚи§„еҲҷжӣҙеҒҸеҗ‘д»Јз ҒејҸжҲ–е·Іжңүе…је®№и§„еҲҷ SchemaпјҢйҡҫд»Ҙж”Ҝж’‘е®ўжҲ·йҖҡиҝҮиЎЁж јеҢ–з•Ңйқўз»ҙжҠӨвҖңCPU ж ёж•° = 4 дёҚе…је®№зЎ¬зӣҳйҖҹзҺҮ = 5400вҖқиҝҷзұ»з»“жһ„еҢ–и§„еҲҷгҖӮжң¬ RFC жҸҗи®®еңЁ `Rule.rawCode` дёӯж–°еўһдәҢе…ғгҖҒдёүе…ғз»“жһ„еҢ–и§„еҲҷ SchemaпјҢе№¶еңЁ `ModuleGenneratorByAnno` жһ„е»әдә§е“Ғ/жЁЎеқ—еҹәзЎҖж•°жҚ®ж—¶еұ•ејҖдёә `CodependantRuleSchema`пјҢдҪҝз»ҙжҠӨжҖҒеҸҜиҜ»гҖҒиҝҗиЎҢжҖҒеҸҜжү§иЎҢгҖӮ
+
+жң¬иЎҘдёҒиҝӣдёҖжӯҘжҳҺзЎ®пјҡз»“жһ„еҢ–и§„еҲҷдёҚеә”еңЁй”Җе”®гҖҒжҺЁиҚҗжҲ–жөӢиҜ•з”ЁдҫӢдёӯдёҙж—¶жӢјиЈ…е№¶е®үиЈ…пјҢиҖҢеә”еғҸзҺ°жңү `@CompatiableRuleAnno` дёҖж ·еЈ°жҳҺеңЁдә§е“Ғзұ»дёҠгҖӮй”Җе”®зҺҜиҠӮеҸӘдҪҝз”Ёе·Із»Ҹз”ҹжҲҗеҘҪзҡ„ Module и§„еҲҷж•°жҚ®пјҢйҖҡиҝҮеҺҹжңү `inferParas` й“ҫи·ҜеҒҡжҺЁиҚҗ/з”ҹжҲҗпјҢйҖҡиҝҮж–°еўһ `validate` й“ҫи·Ҝж ЎйӘҢе·Іжңү `ModuleInst`гҖӮ
@@
-еҪ“еүҚд»Јз ҒеҹәзәҝиҜҙжҳҺпјҡ
-
-- `Rule` еҪ“еүҚе·Іжңү `rawCode`гҖҒ`ruleSchemaTypeFullName`гҖҒ`fatherCode`гҖҒ`calcStage` зӯүеӯ—ж®өпјҢе°ҡжңӘеҢ…еҗ«жң¬ RFC е»әи®®зҡ„ `parentRuleCode` е’Ң `exeSchema`гҖӮ
-- `RuleSchema` еҪ“еүҚжіЁеҶҢдәҶ `CompatiableRuleSchema`гҖҒ`CalculateRuleSchema`гҖҒ`SelectRuleSchema`гҖҒ`CodeRuleSchema`гҖҒ`PriorityRuleSchema`пјҢе°ҡжңӘжіЁеҶҢжң¬ RFC ж–°еўһзҡ„з»“жһ„еҢ– SchemaгҖӮ
-- еҚ—еҗ‘ API е·ІжҢү `RFC-0005-0.1` ж”¶ж•ӣдёә `ModuleAlgBase`гҖҒ`ModuleCPModel`гҖҒ`PartCategoryCPModel` е’Ң `com.jmix.executor.southinf.cp.*` facadeпјӣ`ConstraintAlgBase`гҖҒ`ConstraintModel`гҖҒ`ConstraintVarRegistry`гҖҒ`ModuleInstAccessor` зӯүдёҚеҶҚдҪңдёәжӯЈејҸеҚ—еҗ‘зұ»еһӢгҖӮ
+еҪ“еүҚд»Јз ҒеҹәзәҝиҜҙжҳҺпјҡ
+
+- `Rule` е·Ідҝқз•ҷ `rawCode`гҖҒ`ruleSchemaTypeFullName`гҖҒ`fatherCode`гҖҒ`calcStage` зӯүеӯ—ж®өпјҢе№¶ж–°еўһ `parentRuleCode` дёҺ `exeSchema`гҖӮ
+- `RuleSchema` е·ІжіЁеҶҢ `PairStructRuleSchema`гҖҒ`TripleStructRuleSchema`гҖҒ`CombinationStructRuleSchema`пјҢз»“жһ„еҢ–и§„еҲҷеҸҜеәҸеҲ—еҢ–дёәз»ҙжҠӨжҖҒ SchemaгҖӮ
+- `ModuleGenneratorByAnno` е·Іж”ҜжҢҒиҜ»еҸ–з»“жһ„еҢ–и§„еҲҷжіЁи§ЈпјҢе№¶еңЁжһ„е»ә Module еҗҺз”ҹжҲҗ `CodependantRuleSchema` иҝҗиЎҢжҖҒ SchemaгҖӮ
+- еҚ—еҗ‘ API е·ІжҢү `RFC-0005-0.1` ж”¶ж•ӣдёә `ModuleAlgBase`гҖҒ`ModuleCPModel`гҖҒ`PartCategoryCPModel` е’Ң `com.jmix.executor.southinf.cp.*` facadeпјӣ`ConstraintAlgBase`гҖҒ`ConstraintModel`гҖҒ`ConstraintVarRegistry`гҖҒ`ModuleInstAccessor` зӯүдёҚеҶҚдҪңдёәжӯЈејҸеҚ—еҗ‘зұ»еһӢгҖӮ
```

### 3.11 жһ„е»әжңҹеұ•ејҖжөҒзЁӢ

з»“жһ„еҢ–иЎЁиҫҫејҸзҡ„и§ЈжһҗдҪҚзҪ®еңЁ `ModuleGenneratorByAnno` жһ„е»әжөҒзЁӢд№ӢеҗҺпјҢдёҚжҳҜеңЁи®Ўз®—еј•ж“ҺжұӮи§Јж—¶гҖӮзӣ®ж Үе®һзҺ°дёӯпјҢз”ҹжҲҗеҷЁиҜ»еҸ– `Rule.rawCode` дёӯзҡ„ `PairStructRuleSchema`гҖҒ`TripleStructRuleSchema`гҖҒ`CombinationStructRuleSchema`пјҢе№¶з”ҹжҲҗзҲ¶и§„еҲҷзҡ„ `Rule.exeSchema = CodependantRuleSchema`гҖӮ

е»әи®®еңЁ `ModuleGenneratorByAnno` еҶ…йғЁеўһеҠ дёҖдёӘе°Ҹзҡ„еұ•ејҖз»„д»¶пјҢдҫӢеҰӮпјҡ

```java
final class StructRuleBuildExpander {
    CodependantRuleSchema expandCombination(Rule parentRule, Module module, List<Rule> allRules) {
        CombinationStructRuleSchema schema =
                (CombinationStructRuleSchema) parentRule.getRawCode();

        List<Rule> subRules = findSubRules(parentRule, schema, allRules);
        validateArityAndDimensions(schema, subRules);

        List<PartCombination> combinations = new ArrayList<>();
        for (Rule subRule : subRules) {
            List<List<String>> partCodeSets = resolveExprsToPartCodes(subRule, module);
            combinations.addAll(cartesianProduct(partCodeSets, subRule.getCode()));
        }

        CodependantRuleSchema exe = new CodependantRuleSchema();
        exe.setArity(schema.getArity());
        exe.setDimensionCategoryCodes(schema.getDimensionCategoryCodes());
        exe.setType(schema.getType());
        exe.setCombinations(distinct(combinations));
        return exe;
    }
}
```

иЎЁиҫҫејҸи§ЈжһҗеҸӘдҫқиө– `Module` йқҷжҖҒж•°жҚ®пјҡ

```java
List<String> resolveToPartCodes(StructExprSchema expr, Module module) {
    PartCategory category = module.getPartCategory(expr.getObjectCode());
    List<Part> rawParts = category.getAllAtomicParts();

    List<Part> matchedParts = structExprResolver.doSelect(rawParts, expr);
    return matchedParts.stream()
            .map(Part::getCode)
            .distinct()
            .collect(Collectors.toList());
}
```

жһ„е»әжңҹеұ•ејҖжӯҘйӘӨпјҡ

1. `ModuleGenneratorByAnno.createRulesFromMethods(...)` жҲ–е…¶еҗҺзҪ®йҳ¶ж®өж”¶йӣҶе…ЁйғЁи§„еҲҷгҖӮ
2. ж №жҚ® `CombinationStructRuleSchema.subRuleCodes` жҲ– `Rule.parentRuleCode` жүҫеҲ°еӯҗи§„еҲҷгҖӮ
3. ж ЎйӘҢзҲ¶и§„еҲҷ `arity`гҖҒ`dimensionCategoryCodes` дёҺеӯҗи§„еҲҷиЎЁиҫҫејҸдёҖиҮҙгҖӮ
4. дҪҝз”Ё `FilterExpressionExecutor` еҹәдәҺ Module йқҷжҖҒ `Part` ж•°жҚ®и§ЈжһҗжҜҸдёӘ `StructExprSchema`гҖӮ
5. еҜ№жҜҸжқЎеӯҗи§„еҲҷи§ЈжһҗеҮәзҡ„йғЁд»¶ code йӣҶеҗҲеҒҡз¬ӣеҚЎе°”з§ҜпјҢз”ҹжҲҗ `PartCombination`гҖӮ
6. еҺ»йҮҚеҗҺеҶҷе…ҘзҲ¶и§„еҲҷ `exeSchema`гҖӮ
7. `parentRuleCode` йқһз©әзҡ„еӯҗи§„еҲҷеҸӘз”ЁдәҺзҲ¶и§„еҲҷеұ•ејҖпјҢдёҚиҝӣе…ҘзӢ¬з«Ӣжү§иЎҢй“ҫи·ҜгҖӮ

иҝҗиЎҢж—¶дёҚеҶҚи§Јжһҗ `StructExprSchema`гҖӮеҰӮжһңиҜ·жұӮжҖҒ PartCategory Filter еҜјиҮҙжҹҗдәӣ part code дёҚеӯҳеңЁдәҺеҪ“еүҚжұӮи§ЈжЁЎеһӢзҡ„йғЁд»¶еҸҳйҮҸжҳ е°„дёӯпјҢжү§иЎҢеҷЁжҢүеҪ“еүҚжЁЎеһӢжҳ е°„з»“жһңеӨ„зҗҶпјҡ

- BLACKпјҡжҹҗдёӘ tuple дёӯд»»дёҖ code дёҚеӯҳеңЁпјҢеҲҷиҜҘзҰҒжӯў tuple еҪ“еүҚдёҚеҸҜиғҪеҗҢж—¶йҖүдёӯпјҢеҸҜд»Ҙи·іиҝҮгҖӮ
- WHITEпјҡжҹҗдёӘ tuple дёӯд»»дёҖ code дёҚеӯҳеңЁпјҢеҲҷиҜҘе…Ғи®ё tuple еҪ“еүҚдёҚеҸҜе‘ҪдёӯпјҢдёҚеҠ е…ҘеҖҷйҖү matchгҖӮ
- WHITEпјҡжүҖжңүе…Ғи®ё tuple йғҪдёҚеҸҜе‘Ҫдёӯж—¶пјҢеңЁзӣёе…із»ҙеәҰиў«иҰҒжұӮйҖүжӢ©зҡ„жғ…еҶөдёӢеә”ж— и§ЈгҖӮ

### 3.12 CP зәҰжқҹз”ҹжҲҗ

ж–°еўһ `CodependantConstraintExecutor`гҖӮе®ғеҸӘж¶Ҳиҙ№ `CodependantRuleSchema`пјҢе№¶еңЁи®Ўз®—еј•ж“ҺеҶ…ж №жҚ® part code жҹҘжүҫеҪ“еүҚжЁЎеһӢйҮҢзҡ„йғЁд»¶еҸҳйҮҸгҖӮ

иҫ№з•ҢзәҰе®ҡпјҡ

- дә§е“Ғз®—жі•е’Ңж–ҮжЎЈйӘҢж”¶ж ·дҫӢдҪҝз”Ё `ModuleAlgBase.model()` иҝ”еӣһзҡ„ `ModuleCPModel`пјҢд»ҘеҸҠ `AlgCPBoolVar`гҖҒ`AlgCPLiteral`гҖҒ`AlgCPLinearExpr`гҖҒ`PartVar` зӯү facadeгҖӮ
- еј•ж“ҺеҶ…йғЁжү§иЎҢеҷЁеҸҜд»ҘеңЁ `impl` еҢ…дёӯйҖҡиҝҮ `SouthboundLatestBridge` / `AlgCPFacadeAdapters` unwrap еҲ° OR-ToolsпјҢдҪҶиҜҘз»ҶиҠӮдёҚиғҪиҝӣе…Ҙ `southinf` жҺҘеҸЈжҲ–дә§е“Ғз®—жі•жәҗз ҒгҖӮ
- иӢҘжү§иЎҢеҷЁзӣҙжҺҘжҢӮеңЁ `impl.algmodel` еҶ…йғЁпјҢд№ҹеҸҜд»ҘдҪҝз”Ё `PartVarImpl` жҹҘжүҫеҪ“еүҚ `partMap`пјӣдҪҶ RFC зҡ„зЁіе®ҡдјӘд»Јз Ғд»Ҙ facade иЎЁиҫҫпјҢйҒҝе…ҚдёҺ `RFC-0005-0.1` еҗҺзҡ„еҚ—еҗ‘иҫ№з•ҢеҶІзӘҒгҖӮ
- жіЁж„Ҹпјҡд»ҘдёӢзӨәдҫӢжҳҜ facade дјӘд»Јз ҒпјҢеұ•зӨәзӣ®ж Ү API еҸЈеҫ„пјӣ`CodependantConstraintExecutor` зҡ„жңҖз»ҲиҗҪзӮ№еҸҜд»ҘжҳҜ `impl` еҶ…йғЁзұ»пјҢд№ҹеҸҜд»ҘжҳҜиў« bridge еҢ…иЈ…еҗҺзҡ„еҚ—еҗ‘йЈҺж јз»„д»¶гҖӮ

            return;
        }

            addWhitelist(ruleCode, schema, partVarGetter);

public class CodependantConstraintExecutor {
    private final ModuleCPModel model;

    public void execute(String ruleCode, CodependantRuleSchema schema,
            Function<String, PartVar> partVarGetter) {
        if (schema.getType() == PartCombinationType.BLACK) {
            addBlacklist(ruleCode, schema, partVarGetter);
            return;
        }
        if (schema.getType() == PartCombinationType.WHITE) {
            addWhitelist(ruleCode, schema, partVarGetter);
            return;
        }
        throw new AlgLoaderException("Unsupported PartCombinationType: " + schema.getType());
    }
}
```

й»‘еҗҚеҚ•зәҰжқҹпјҡ

```java
private void addBlacklist(String ruleCode, CodependantRuleSchema schema,
        Function<String, PartVar> partVarGetter) {
    for (PartCombination combination : schema.getCombinations()) {
        List<PartVar> partVars = combination.getCodes(schema.getArity()).stream()
                .map(partVarGetter)
                .filter(Objects::nonNull)
                .collect(Collectors.toList());

        if (partVars.size() != schema.getArity()) {
            continue;
        }

        AlgCPLinearExpr selectedSum = model.newLinearExpr(ruleCode + "_black_sum");
        for (PartVar partVar : partVars) {
            selectedSum.addTerm(partVar.selectedVar(), 1);
        }
        model.addLessOrEqual(selectedSum, partVars.size() - 1);
    }
}
```

дәҢе…ғй»‘еҗҚеҚ•зҡ„ж•°еӯҰиҜӯд№үеә”жҳҜпјҡ

```text
cpu1.S + drive2.S <= 1
```

д№ҹе°ұжҳҜдёҚе…Ғи®ёдёӨиҖ…еҗҢж—¶дёә 1гҖӮиҝҷйҮҢзЎ®и®ӨдҪҝз”Ё `<= 1`пјҢдёҚдҪҝз”Ё `< 1`гҖӮ

зҷҪеҗҚеҚ•зәҰжқҹпјҡ

```java
private void addWhitelist(String ruleCode, CodependantRuleSchema schema,
        Function<String, PartVar> partVarGetter) {
    List<AlgCPBoolVar> tupleMatches = new ArrayList<>();

    for (PartCombination combination : schema.getCombinations()) {
        List<PartVar> partVars = combination.getCodes(schema.getArity()).stream()
                .map(partVarGetter)
                .collect(Collectors.toList());
        if (partVars.stream().anyMatch(Objects::isNull)) {
            continue;
        }

        AlgCPBoolVar match = model.newBoolVar(ruleCode + "_match_" + tupleMatches.size());
        AlgCPLiteral[] selected = partVars.stream()
                .map(PartVar::selectedVar)
                .toArray(AlgCPLiteral[]::new);

        model.addBoolAnd(selected).onlyEnforceIf(match);
        model.addBoolOr(Arrays.stream(selected)
                .map(AlgCPLiteral::not)
                .toArray(AlgCPLiteral[]::new)).onlyEnforceIf(match.not());

        tupleMatches.add(match);
    }

    model.addBoolOr(tupleMatches.toArray(new AlgCPLiteral[0]));
}
```

еҸҜйҖү PartCategory зҡ„ guard иҜӯд№үжң¬ RFC жҡӮдёҚе®һзҺ°пјҢе·Із”ұ `doc/RFC-0009-Optional-PartCategory-Whitelist-Guard.md` еҚ•зӢ¬и·ҹиёӘгҖӮеҪ“еүҚ `@PartAnno` д№ҹе°ҡжңӘеҢ…еҗ« `required` еӯ—ж®өпјҢRFC-0007 дёҚеңЁжӯӨеӨ„жү©еұ•еҲҶзұ»еҝ…йҖү/еҸҜйҖүжЁЎеһӢгҖӮ

### 3.13 еҢ—еҗ‘ validate ж ЎйӘҢжҺҘеҸЈ

- `PairStructRuleSchema.getToRightProgObjs()` иҝ”еӣһ `expr2` еј•з”ЁгҖӮ

### 3.18 дёҺзҺ°жңүд»Јз Ғз”ҹжҲҗй“ҫи·Ҝзҡ„е…ізі»

зҺ°жңү `ModuleAlgArtifactGenerator` е·ІиғҪжҠҠйғЁеҲҶ `CompatiableRuleSchema` иҪ¬жҚўдёәз”ҹжҲҗејҸ Java и§„еҲҷгҖӮ`RFC-0005-0.1` еҗҺпјҢз”ҹжҲҗејҸ Java и§„еҲҷеҝ…йЎ»з»§жүҝ `ModuleAlgBase`пјҢе№¶йҖҡиҝҮ `model()` дҪҝз”Ё `ModuleCPModel` дёҺ `AlgCP*` facadeгҖӮжң¬ RFC ж–°еўһзҡ„жҳҜвҖңжһ„е»әжңҹеұ•ејҖгҖҒиҝҗиЎҢжңҹжү§иЎҢвҖқзҡ„и·Ҝеҫ„пјҡ

```text
Rule.rawCode
  -> ModuleGenneratorByAnno / StructRuleBuildExpander
  -> Rule.exeSchema = CodependantRuleSchema
  -> CodependantConstraintExecutor
  -> CP constraint
```

иҝҷж · UI дёҚйңҖиҰҒз”ҹжҲҗ Java д»Јз ҒгҖӮиӢҘеҗҺз»ӯд»ҚйңҖиҰҒз”ҹжҲҗ JavaпјҢеҸҜз”ұ `StructCodeInjector` жҲ– `ModuleAlgArtifactGenerator` з”ҹжҲҗзӯүд»·и°ғз”ЁпјҢдҫӢеҰӮпјҡ

```java
inCompatible("rule_cpu_drive_4_5400", "cpu:CoreNum=4", "drive:Speed=5400");
```

з”ҹжҲҗејҸи·Ҝеҫ„еҝ…йЎ»йҒөе®ҲеҪ“еүҚеҚ—еҗ‘иҫ№з•ҢпјҡдёҚзӣҙжҺҘеҜје…Ҙ `com.jmix.executor.impl.*` жҲ– `com.google.ortools.*`гҖӮдҪҶз»„еҗҲи§„еҲҷзҡ„зҷҪеҗҚеҚ•жӣҙйҖӮеҗҲз”ұ `CodependantRuleSchema` зӣҙжҺҘжү§иЎҢпјҢйҒҝе…Қз”ҹжҲҗеӨ§йҮҸйҮҚеӨҚ Java ж–№жі•гҖӮ

    private ModuleGenneratorByAnno() {

    /**
     * ж №жҚ®зәҰжқҹз®—жі•зұ»жһ„е»әModuleеҜ№иұЎ
     * 
     * @param moduleAlgClazz зәҰжқҹз®—жі•зұ»
     * @return жһ„е»әзҡ„ModuleеҜ№иұЎ
     */
    public static Module buildModule(Class<?> moduleAlgClazz) {
        Module module = new Module();

        // 1. ж №жҚ®ModuleAnnoдҝЎжҒҜеҲӣе»әModule
        ModuleAnno moduleAnno = moduleAlgClazz.getAnnotation(ModuleAnno.class);
        if (moduleAnno == null) {
            log.error("ModuleAnno not found for class: {}", moduleAlgClazz.getName());
            throw new AlgLoaderException("ModuleAnno not found for class: " + moduleAlgClazz.getName());
        }
        // 1. и®ҫзҪ®жЁЎеқ—еҹәзЎҖеұһжҖ§
        buildModuleBase(module, moduleAnno, moduleAlgClazz);

        // з”ҹжҲҗmodule.alg
        ModuleAlgArtifact alg = buildAlg(module, moduleAlgClazz);

        module.setAlg(alg);

        // еӨ„зҗҶжү©еұ•еұһжҖ§
        buildExtAttr(moduleAnno, module);

        // 2. йҒҚеҺҶжҲҗе‘ҳеҸҳйҮҸпјҢеҲӣе»әParaе’ҢPartпјҢж №жҚ®fatherCodeж·»еҠ еҲ°еҜ№еә”зҡ„PartCategory
        Pair<List<Para>, List<IPart>> paraParts = buildParameterParts(moduleAlgClazz);
        module.setParas(paraParts.getFirst());
        module.addParts(paraParts.getSecond());
        // еӨ„зҗҶеӨҡе®һдҫӢеҲҶзұ»пјҢж №жҚ®PartAnnoзҡ„instCodesеұһжҖ§иҝӣиЎҢеұ•ејҖ
        MultiInstCategoryUtils.processInstCategory(module);
        module.init(); // дҝқиҜҒеҗҺз»ӯиғҪдҪҝз”ЁgetParaзӯүеҮҪж•°
        // 4. з”ҹжҲҗи§„еҲҷ
        List<Rule> rules = createRulesFromMethods(moduleAlgClazz, module);
        module.setRules(rules);

        return module;
    }

    /**
     * ж №жҚ®зәҰжқҹз®—жі•зұ»е’Ңиө„жәҗи·Ҝеҫ„жһ„е»әModuleеҜ№иұЎ
     * 
     * @param moduleAlgClazz зәҰжқҹз®—жі•зұ»
     * @param resourcePath   иө„жәҗи·Ҝеҫ„
     * @return жһ„е»әзҡ„ModuleеҜ№иұЎ
     */
    public static Module build(Class<?> moduleAlgClazz, String resourcePath) {
        Module module = buildModule(moduleAlgClazz);

        // дҝқеӯҳModuleеҲ°ж–Үд»¶
        saveToFile(module, resourcePath);
        return module;
    }

    @Override
    public Result<List<ModuleInst>> inferParas(InferParasReq req) {
        if (req == null) {
            return Result.failed("req is null");
        }
        if (req.getPartConstraintReqs() == null || req.getPartConstraintReqs().isEmpty()) {
            return inferParasOld(req);
        }
        try {
            // иҺ·еҸ–еҹәзЎҖж•°жҚ®
            Module module = getModule(req.getModuleId(), req.getModuleCode());
            module.init();

            // еҲӣе»әйғЁд»¶еҲҶзұ»зәҰжқҹжү§иЎҢеҷЁ
            ModuleAlgClassLoader loader = getModuleClassLoader(module.getId());
            if (loader == null) {
                log.error("ModuleAlgClassLoader not found for module: {}", module.getId());
                return Result.failed("ModuleAlgClassLoader not found for module: " + module.getId());
            }
            ModuleBaseConstraintExecutorImpl baseExecutor = null;
            Result<List<ModuleInst>> result = null;
            InferPartCategoryReq cReq = toInferPartCategoryReq(req);
            if (!Strings.isNullOrEmpty(cReq.getPartCategoryCode())) {
                baseExecutor = new PartCategoryConstraintExecutorImpl();
            } else {
                baseExecutor = this;
            }
            baseExecutor.init(module, config, loader);
            result = baseExecutor.doProcess(cReq);

            return result;
        } catch (AlgLoaderException | AlgExecutorException ex) {
            log.error("Failed to infer paras", ex);
            return Result.failed("exception: " + ex.getMessage());
        }
    }

    @Override
    public boolean validate(ModuleInst moduleInst) {
        if (moduleInst == null || moduleInst.getId() == null) {
            return false;
        }
        ModuleValidateReq req = new ModuleValidateReq();
        req.setModuleId(moduleInst.getId());
        req.setModuleInst(moduleInst);
        Result<ModuleValidateResp> result = validate(req);
        return result.getCode() == Result.SUCCESS && result.getData() != null && result.getData().isValid();
    }

    @Override
    public Result<ModuleValidateResp> validate(ModuleValidateReq req) {
        if (req == null) {
            return Result.failed("req is null");
        }
        if (req.getModuleInst() == null) {
            return Result.failed("moduleInst is null");
        }
        try {
            Module module = getModule(req.getModuleId(), req.getModuleCode());
            module.init();
            ModuleValidateResp resp = new ModuleValidateResp();
            List<String> violatedRuleCodes = validateModuleInst(module, req.getModuleInst());
            resp.setViolatedRuleCodes(violatedRuleCodes);
            resp.setValid(violatedRuleCodes.isEmpty());
            return Result.success(resp);
```
</details></tool-use>

package com.jmix.executor.impl.algmodel;

import com.jmix.executor.bmodel.logic.BusinessRelationType;
import com.jmix.executor.bmodel.logic.CodependantRuleSchema;
import com.jmix.executor.bmodel.logic.PairStructRuleSchema;
import com.jmix.executor.bmodel.logic.PartCombination;
import com.jmix.executor.bmodel.logic.PartCombinationType;
import com.jmix.executor.bmodel.logic.Rule;
import com.jmix.executor.bmodel.logic.RuleSchema;
import com.jmix.executor.bmodel.logic.TripleStructRuleSchema;
import com.jmix.executor.model.AlgLoaderException;

import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;

import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.LinkedHashSet;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Set;

/**
 * Executes structured combination rules against the internal CP model.
 */
@Slf4j
public class CodependantConstraintExecutor {

    private final ModuleAlgImpl moduleAlg;
    private final AlgCPModel model;
    private final StructExprResolver resolver;
    private final StructRuleBuildExpander expander;

    public CodependantConstraintExecutor(ModuleAlgImpl moduleAlg) {
        this.moduleAlg = moduleAlg;
        this.model = moduleAlg.getModel();
        this.resolver = new StructExprResolver(moduleAlg);
        this.expander = new StructRuleBuildExpander(moduleAlg.getModule(), moduleAlg);
    }

    public void execute(Rule rule) {
        if (rule.getExeSchema() instanceof CodependantRuleSchema schema) {
            executeCodependant(rule.getCode(), schema);
            return;
        }
        RuleSchema rawCode = rule.getRawCode();
        if (rawCode instanceof PairStructRuleSchema pairSchema) {
            executePair(rule, pairSchema);
            return;
        }
        if (rawCode instanceof TripleStructRuleSchema tripleSchema) {
            executeTriple(rule, tripleSchema);
            return;
        }
        CodependantRuleSchema schema = expander.expand(rule);
        executeCodependant(rule.getCode(), schema);
    }

    private void executePair(Rule rule, PairStructRuleSchema schema) {
        if (schema.getRelationType() == null) {
            throw new AlgLoaderException("Pair structured rule relationType cannot be null: " + rule.getCode());
        }
        if (schema.getRelationType() == BusinessRelationType.INCOMPATIBLE) {
            executeCodependant(rule.getCode(), expander.expand(rule));
            return;
        }
        List<PartVarImpl> leftParts = resolver.resolve(schema.getExpr1());
        List<PartVarImpl> rightParts = resolver.resolve(schema.getExpr2());
        addPairRelation(rule.getCode(), schema.getRelationType(), leftParts, rightParts);
    }

    private void executeTriple(Rule rule, TripleStructRuleSchema schema) {
        if (schema.getRelationType() != BusinessRelationType.INCOMPATIBLE) {
            throw new AlgLoaderException("Only ternary incompatible structured rules are supported: "
                    + rule.getCode());
        }
        executeCodependant(rule.getCode(), expander.expand(rule));
    }

    private void executeCodependant(String ruleCode, CodependantRuleSchema schema) {
        validateSchema(ruleCode, schema);
        if (schema.getCombinationType() == PartCombinationType.WHITE) {
            executeWhiteList(ruleCode, schema);
        } else {
            executeBlackList(ruleCode, schema);
        }
    }

    private void executeBlackList(String ruleCode, CodependantRuleSchema schema) {
        int added = 0;
        for (PartCombination combination : schema.getCombinations()) {
            List<PartVarImpl> vars = currentTupleVars(combination.getCodes(schema.getArity()));
            if (vars.size() != schema.getArity()) {
                continue;
            }
            addForbiddenTuple(ruleCode, vars);
            added++;
        }
        log.info("Executed structured blacklist rule: rule={}, constraints={}", ruleCode, added);
    }

    private void executeWhiteList(String ruleCode, CodependantRuleSchema schema) {
        Set<String> allowedTupleKeys = new LinkedHashSet<>();
        for (PartCombination combination : schema.getCombinations()) {
            if (currentTupleVars(combination.getCodes(schema.getArity())).size() == schema.getArity()) {
                allowedTupleKeys.add(StructExprResolver.tupleKey(combination.getCodes(schema.getArity())));
            }
        }

        List<List<PartVarImpl>> dimensions = resolver.currentDimensionParts(schema.getDimensionCategoryCodes());
        List<List<PartVarImpl>> forbiddenTuples = new ArrayList<>();
        collectForbiddenTuples(dimensions, 0, new ArrayList<>(), allowedTupleKeys, forbiddenTuples);
        for (List<PartVarImpl> tuple : forbiddenTuples) {
            addForbiddenTuple(ruleCode, tuple);
        }
        log.info("Executed structured whitelist rule: rule={}, allowed={}, forbiddenConstraints={}",
                
... (truncated)

package com.jmix.executor.bmodel.logic;

import lombok.Data;
import lombok.EqualsAndHashCode;

import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.List;

/**
 * з»“жһ„еҢ–з»„еҗҲи§„еҲҷеұ•ејҖеҗҺзҡ„иҝҗиЎҢжҖҒ SchemaгҖӮ

@Data
@EqualsAndHashCode(callSuper = true)
public class CodependantRuleSchema extends RuleSchema {
    private int arity;

    private List<String> dimensionCategoryCodes = new ArrayList<>();

    private List<PartCombination> combinations = new ArrayList<>();

    @Override
    public List<RefProgObjSchema> getFromLeftProgObjs() {
        return dimensionRefs();
    }

    public PartCombinationType getCombinationType() {
        return getType() == null || getType().isEmpty() ? null : PartCombinationType.valueOf(getType());
    }

    public void setCombinationType(PartCombinationType combinationType) {
        setType(combinationType == null ? null : combinationType.name());
    }

    public void setType(PartCombinationType combinationType) {
        setCombinationType(combinationType);
    }

    @Override
    public List<RefProgObjSchema> getToRightProgObjs() {
        return dimensionRefs();
    }

    private List<RefProgObjSchema> dimensionRefs() {
        List<RefProgObjSchema> refs = new ArrayList<>();
        for (String categoryCode : dimensionCategoryCodes) {
            refs.add(new RefProgObjSchema(RefProgObjSchema.PROG_OBJ_TYPE_PARTCATEGORY, categoryCode, null));
        }
        return refs;
    }
}

<tool-use data-tool-type="shell" data-tool-name="shell_command"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **shell_command** `(Get-Content -Path src\test\java\com\jmix\scenario\ruletest\StructCombinationRuleTest.java -Encoding UTF8) | Select-Object -Skip 280 -First 70`</summary>
```
Exit code: 0
Wall time: 0.3 seconds
Output:
    }

    private Result<ModuleValidateResp> validate(ModuleInst moduleInst) {
        ModuleValidateReq req = new ModuleValidateReq();
        req.setModuleId(getModule().getId());
        req.setModuleInst(moduleInst);
        return ModuleConstraintExecutor.INST.validate(req);
    }

    private ModuleInst moduleInst(String... selectedPartCodes) {
        return moduleInst(toPrePartInsts(selectedPartCodes).toArray(PartInst[]::new));
    }

    private ModuleInst moduleInst(PartInst... partInsts) {
        ModuleInst inst = new ModuleInst();
        inst.setId(getModule().getId());
        for (PartInst partInst : partInsts) {
            inst.addPartInst(partInst);
        }
        return inst;
    }

    private PartInst partInst(String code, int quantity) {
        PartInst partInst = new PartInst(code, quantity);
        partInst.setSelected(quantity > 0);
        return partInst;
    }

    private void assertPass(String... selectedPartCodes) {
        runWithSelectedParts(selectedPartCodes);
        resultAssert().assertSuccess();
    }

    private void assertNoSolution(String... selectedPartCodes) {
        runWithSelectedParts(selectedPartCodes);
        resultAssert().assertSolutionSizeEqual(0);
    }

    private void runWithSelectedParts(String... selectedPartCodes) {
        InferParasReq req = new InferParasReq();
        req.setModuleId(getModule().getId());
        req.setEnumerateAllSolution(false);
        req.setPrePartInsts(toPrePartInsts(selectedPartCodes));
        Result<List<ModuleInst>> result = ModuleConstraintExecutor.INST.inferParas(req);
        setResult(result);
        setSolutions(result.getData());
    }

    private List<PartInst> toPrePartInsts(String... selectedPartCodes) {
        List<String> pairs = new ArrayList<>();
        for (String selectedPartCode : selectedPartCodes) {
            pairs.add(selectedPartCode);
            pairs.add("1");
        }
        return toPreParts(pairs.toArray(String[]::new));
    }
}
```
</details></tool-use>

     * @param partCode           йғЁд»¶д»Јз Ғ
     * @param qty                ж•°йҮҸ
     * @param paraCodeValuePairs еҸӮж•°д»Јз Ғе’ҢеҖјзҡ„дәӨжӣҝж•°з»„пјҢж јејҸпјҡparaCode1, value1, paraCode2,
     *                           value2, ...
     * @return жҺЁзҗҶз»“жһң
     */
    protected List<ModuleInst> inferParas(String partCode, Integer qty, String... paraCodeValuePairs) {
        return inferParas(partCode, qty, toPreParas(paraCodeValuePairs), new ArrayList<>());
    }

    /**
     * жү§иЎҢеҸӮж•°жҺЁзҗҶ
     * s
     * 
     * @param partCode йғЁд»¶д»Јз Ғ
     * @param qty      ж•°йҮҸ
     * @param preParas еүҚзҪ®еҸӮж•°еҲ—иЎЁ
     * @param preParts еүҚзҪ®йғЁд»¶еҲ—иЎЁ
     * @return жҺЁзҗҶз»“жһң
     */
    protected List<ModuleInst> inferParas(String partCode, Integer qty, List<ParaInst> preParas,
            List<PartInst> preParts) {
        InferParasReq req = new InferParasReq();
        req.setModuleId(getModule().getId());
        req.setEnumerateAllSolution(isEnumerateAllSolution());

        // и®ҫзҪ®дё»йғЁд»¶е®һдҫӢ
        PartInst mainPartInst = new PartInst();
        mainPartInst.setCode(partCode);
        mainPartInst.setQuantity(qty);
        req.setMainPartInst(mainPartInst);

        // еӨ„зҗҶйў„е®ҡд№үеҸӮж•°пјҲеӨҚз”Ёе…¬е…ұж–№жі•пјү
        req.setPreParaInsts(preParas);
        req.setPrePartInsts(preParts);

        Result<List<ModuleInst>> result = ModuleConstraintExecutor.INST.inferParas(req);
        log.info("Inference result: {}", result);
        setResult(result);
        setSolutions(result.getData());
        return getSolutions();
    }

    /**
     * ж №жҚ®еӨҡдёӘеҸӮж•°еҖјиҝӣиЎҢжҺЁзҗҶпјҲеҸҜеҸҳеҸӮж•°зүҲжң¬пјү
     *
     * @param paraCodeValuePairs еҸӮж•°д»Јз Ғе’ҢеҖјзҡ„дәӨжӣҝж•°з»„пјҢж јејҸпјҡparaCode1, value1, paraCode2,
     *                           value2, ...
     * @return жҺЁзҗҶз»“жһң
     */
    protected List<ModuleInst> inferParasByPara(String... paraCodeValuePairs) {
        InferParasReq req = new InferParasReq();
        req.setModuleId(getModule().getId());
        req.setEnumerateAllSolution(isEnumerateAllSolution());

        // еӨҚз”Ёе…¬е…ұж–№жі•еӨ„зҗҶеҸӮж•°
        req.setPreParaInsts(toPreParas(paraCodeValuePairs));

        Result<List<ModuleInst>> result = ModuleConstraintExecutor.INST.inferParas(req);
        setResult(result);
        setSolutions(result.getData());
        return getSolutions();
    }

    /**
     * дҪҝз”Ё relaxSolve=true иҝӣиЎҢеҸӮж•°жҺЁзҗҶпјҲеҶІзӘҒиҜҠж–ӯжЁЎејҸпјүгҖӮ
     *
     * @param paraCodeValuePairs еҸӮж•°д»Јз Ғе’ҢеҖјзҡ„дәӨжӣҝж•°з»„
     * @return жҺЁзҗҶз»“жһңпјҲйғЁеҲҶи§Јпјү
     */
    protected List<ModuleInst> inferParasByParaRelax(String... paraCodeValuePairs) {
        InferParasReq req = new InferParasReq();
        req.setModuleId(getModule().getId());
        req.setEnumerateAllSolution(isEnumerateAllSolution());
        req.setRelaxSolve(true);

        req.setPreParaInsts(toPreParas(paraCodeValuePairs));

        Result<List<ModuleInst>> result = ModuleConstraintExecutor.INST.inferParas(req);
        setResult(result);
        setSolutions(result.getData());
        return getSolutions();
    }

    /**
     * ж ЎйӘҢйғЁеҲҶи§ЈдёӯеҢ…еҗ«жңҹжңӣзҡ„еӯ—з¬ҰдёІпјҲд»Һ SolverResult.solutions дёӯжҹҘжүҫпјүгҖӮ
     */
    protected void assertPartialSoluContain(String... expectedSubstrings) {
        SolverResult sr = getResult().getSolverResult();

        }
    }

    /**
     * еҹәдәҺйғЁд»¶зәҰжқҹиҝӣиЎҢжҺЁзҗҶжҺЁиҚҗ
     * 
     * @param constraintReqs зәҰжқҹиҜ·жұӮеӯ—з¬ҰдёІж•°з»„
     * @return жҺЁиҚҗзҡ„жЁЎеқ—е®һдҫӢеҲ—иЎЁ
     */
    protected List<ModuleInst> inferRecommendModule(String... constraintReqs) {
        return inferRecommend("", constraintReqs);
    }

    /**
     * еҹәдәҺйғЁд»¶зәҰжқҹиҝӣиЎҢжҺЁзҗҶжҺЁиҚҗ
     * 
     * @param partCategoryCode йғЁд»¶зұ»еҲ«
     * @param constraintReqs   зәҰжқҹиҜ·жұӮеӯ—з¬ҰдёІж•°з»„
     * @return жҺЁиҚҗзҡ„жЁЎеқ—е®һдҫӢеҲ—иЎЁ
     */
    protected List<ModuleInst> inferRecommend(String partCategoryCode, String... constraintReqs) {
        List<PartConstraintReq> partConstraintReqs = toPartConstraintReqs(partCategoryCode, constraintReqs);

        InferParasReq req = new InferParasReq();
        req.setModuleId(getModule().getId());
        req.setEnumerateAllSolution(isEnumerateAllSolution());
        req.setPartCategoryCode(partCategoryCode);
        req.setPartConstraintReqs(partConstraintReqs);

        long startTime = System.currentTimeMillis();
        Result<List<ModuleInst>> result = ModuleConstraintExecutor.INST.inferParas(req);
        long endTime = System.currentTimeMillis();
        long executionTime = endTime - startTime;
        log.info("Inference recommend execution time: {} ms", executionTime);
        setResult(result);
        setSolutions(result.getData());
        return getSolutions();
    }

    private void assertSoluSizeEqual(int size) {
        assertEquals(size, solutions.size(), "Solutions size should be " + size);
    }

    /**
     * жҜ”иҫғSolutionзҡ„еҖј
     *
     * @param index
     * @param expect
     */
    public void assertSoluContain(int index, String expect) {
        assertSoluContain(index, expect, true);
    }

    private void assertSoluContain(int index, String expect, boolean isSimple) {
        String msg = "Solution at index " + index + " should match expected string";
        assertTrue(solutions.size() >= index, msg);
        assertStringContains(solutions.get(index - 1).toShortString(isSimple),
                expect,
                msg);
    }
```

            boolean isAttachRelax,
            List<RelaxVar> confictedRelaxs)
            throws AlgLoaderException, AlgExecutorException {
        // еҲқе§ӢеҢ–зәҰжқҹжЁЎеһӢ
        ModuleAlgImpl alg = initModuleCpModel(module, req, isAttachRelax, confictedRelaxs);
        AlgCPModel model = alg.getModel();

        if (config.isLogModelProto()) {
            // е°Ҷmoduleзҡ„CpModelProtoдҝЎжҒҜиҫ“еҮәеҲ°ж–Үд»¶config.logFilePath/module.proto.txt
            model.getCpModel().exportToFile(config.getLogFilePath() + File.separator + module.getCode() + ".proto.txt");
        }
        CpSolver solver = new CpSolver();
        solver.getParameters().setEnumerateAllSolutions(req.isEnumerateAllSolution());
        solver.getParameters().setNumSearchWorkers(1); // еҚ•зәҝзЁӢжҗңзҙўпјҢйҳІжӯўжңүйҮҚеӨҚи§Ј
        if (model.hasDecisionStrategies()) {
            solver.getParameters().setSearchBranching(SatParameters.SearchBranching.FIXED_SEARCH);
            log.info("FIXED_SEARCH enabled for decision strategies");
        }
        log.info("solver parameters:\n" + solver.getParameters().toString());
        // еҸҜжҢүйңҖи®ҫзҪ®жӣҙеӨҡеҸӮж•°
        ModuleInstSolutionCallBack cb = new ModuleInstSolutionCallBack(module, alg);
        CpSolverStatus status = solver.solve(model.getCpModel(), cb);
        log.info("solver  models:\n");
        model.printModelSummary();
        return new RunInferParasRsp(status, cb, alg.getModel(), solver);
    }

    private ModuleAlgImpl initModuleCpModel(Module module, InferParasReq req,
            boolean isAttachRelax, List<RelaxVar> confictedRelaxs)
            throws AlgLoaderException, AlgExecutorException {
        // еҲӣе»әзәҰжқҹз®—жі•е®һдҫӢ
        ModuleAlgImpl alg = createConstraintAlg(module.getId(), module.getCode());
        AlgCPModel model = new AlgCPModel();
        model.setIsAttachRelax(isAttachRelax);
        model.setConfictedRelaxVars(confictedRelaxs);
        // ж №жҚ®loadTypeеҶіе®ҡжҳҜеҗҰдҪҝз”Ёе·®йҮҸеҠ иҪҪжЁЎеһӢ
        if (config.getLoadType() == ConstraintConfig.LOAD_TYPE_INCREMENTAL) {
            // е·®йҮҸеҠ иҪҪжЁЎеһӢ
            List<String> inputProgObjs = ReqUtils.buildInputProgObjs(req);

            // жҹҘиҜўеӯҗеӣҫ
            Pair<List<String>, List<RefProgObjSchema>> relativePair = module
                    .querySubGraph(inputProgObjs.toArray(new String[0]));

            // жү“еҚ°relativePair.first,relativePair.second, жң¬ж¬ЎжҺЁзҗҶж¶үеҸҠеҲ°exeRulesе’ҢexeProgObjs
            log.info("Incremental loading - involved rules: {}", relativePair.getFirst());
            log.info("Incremental loading - involved progObjs: {}",
                    relativePair.getSecond().stream().map(RefProgObjSchema::getProgObjCode)
                            .collect(java.util.stream.Collectors.toList()));

            // и°ғз”Ёж–°зҡ„initModelж–№жі•,issue:е·®йҮҸеҗҺз»ӯе®һзҺ°
            alg.init(model, module, toModuleInput(module, req));
        } else {
            // е…ЁйҮҸеҠ иҪҪжЁЎеһӢ
            alg.init(model, module, toModuleInput(module, req));
        }

        // // ж №жҚ®иҜ·жұӮеҲқе§ӢеҢ–зәҰжқҹжЁЎеһӢ
        // initModelByReq(req, alg);

        // ж·»еҠ жқҫејӣзӣ®ж ҮеҮҪж•°, ж–№дҫҝи°ғиҜ•
        alg.addRelaxObjectFunction();
        return alg;
    }

    private ModuleInput toModuleInput(Module startModule, InferParasReq req) {
        ModuleInput moduleInput = new ModuleInput();
        moduleInput.setModuleId(startModule.getId());
        moduleInput.setModuleCode(startModule.getCode());
        moduleInput.setMainPartInst(req.getMainPartInst());
        moduleInput.setPreParaInsts(req.getPreParaInsts());
        moduleInput.setPrePartInsts(req.getPrePartInsts());
        moduleInput.setRelaxSolve(req.isRelaxSolve());
        // moduleInput.setPartConstraintReqs(req.getPartConstraintReqs());
        moduleInput.setEnumerateAllSolution(req.isEnumerateAllSolution());
        // moduleInput.setPartCategoryCode(req.getPartCategoryCode());
        Map<String, List<PartConstraintReq>> partConstraintReqMap = normalizePartConstraint(req.getPartConstraintReqs(),
                startModule);
        FilterCloneResult filterResult = ModuleConstraintExecutorImpl.filterClone(startModule,
                partConstraintReqMap);
        moduleInput.setPartCategoryInputs(filterResult.partCategoryInputs());
        moduleInput.setPartCategoryErrorInfoMap(filterResult.errorInfoMap());
        return moduleInput;
    }
